toeic.example_en: If the appraisal value falls below the offer price, the buyer may need to renegotiate.
toeic.example_zh: 若鑑價估值低於出價，買方可能需要重新議價。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 使用執照、入住許可
toeic.example_en: The building cannot be opened to the public until the occupancy permit is issued.
toeic.example_zh: 在使用執照核發之前，這棟建築不能對公眾開放。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 土地分區法規、分區條例
toeic.example_en: Local zoning ordinances determine which types of businesses can operate in each district.
toeic.example_zh: 地方土地分區法規規定每個區域可以營業的事業類型。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 法規變更申請、分區例外申請
toeic.example_en: The developer submitted a variance request to build slightly above the height limit.
toeic.example_zh: 建商提出了法規變更申請，希望可以略高於限高建造。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 資料駐留、資料存放地
toeic.example_en: European customers often ask about data residency to confirm that their information stays within the EU.
toeic.example_zh: 歐洲客戶常會詢問資料駐留問題，以確認他們的資訊存放於歐盟境內。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 資料主權、數據主權
toeic.example_en: Data sovereignty laws restrict cross-border transfers of certain types of personal information.
toeic.example_zh: 資料主權法規限制某些類型個人資訊的跨境傳輸。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 資料最小化（只收集必要資料）
toeic.example_en: Data minimization is a core principle of privacy regulations like the GDPR.
toeic.example_zh: 資料最小化是 GDPR 等隱私法規的核心原則之一。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 目的限制（資料僅可用於蒐集目的）
toeic.example_en: Purpose limitation prevents companies from reusing personal data for unrelated activities.
toeic.example_zh: 目的限制原則阻止公司將個人資料挪用於不相關的活動。

toeic.example_en: As the data controller, we are responsible for ensuring lawful processing of customer data.
toeic.example_zh: 身為資料控管者，我們有責任確保客戶資料的處理合法。

toeic.example_en: Our cloud vendor acts as a data processor and follows our written instructions strictly.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的雲端供應商擔任資料處理者的角色，並嚴格遵循我方的書面指示。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 流程精簡；效率優化
toeic.example_en: The streamlining of approval workflows reduced average processing time from two weeks to three business days.
toeic.example_zh: 審批流程的精簡將平均處理時間從兩週縮短為三個工作日。

toeic.example_en: Please confirm the deliverable date for the user interface mockups before the client meeting on Friday.
toeic.example_zh: 請在週五客戶會議前確認使用者介面樣稿的交付日期。

toeic.example_en: Our recruiting team maintains a talent pool of qualified candidates for future engineering openings.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的招聘團隊維護一個合格候選人才庫，以備未來工程職缺之需。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 人力縮減；裁員
toeic.example_en: The board approved a modest workforce reduction to align operating costs with projected revenue.
toeic.example_zh: 董事會批准了小規模的人力縮減，以使營運成本與預估營收一致。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 利害關係人一致性
toeic.example_en: Achieving stakeholder alignment early in the project prevented costly rework during implementation.
toeic.example_zh: 在專案早期取得利害關係人一致性可避免實施階段的高成本返工。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 可付諸行動的洞見
toeic.example_en: The consultant delivered an actionable insight that helped the marketing team double conversion rates.
toeic.example_zh: 顧問提供了一項可付諸行動的洞見，協助行銷團隊將轉換率翻倍。

toeic.example_en: We used a decision matrix to evaluate the three competing vendor proposals objectively.
toeic.example_zh: 我們使用決策矩陣客觀評估三份相互競爭的供應商提案。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 高階人才挖角；獵頭
toeic.example_en: The firm specializes in headhunting senior executives for technology companies across Asia.
toeic.example_zh: 該公司專門為亞洲科技公司挖角高階主管。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 重新調配；重新部署
toeic.example_en: Management decided to redeploy several engineers from the legacy system to the new platform team.
toeic.example_zh: 管理層決定將數名工程師從舊系統重新調配至新平台團隊。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 交叉訓練；多技能培訓
toeic.example_en: We cross-train customer service representatives so they can handle both technical and billing inquiries.
toeic.example_zh: 我們對客戶服務代表進行交叉訓練，使他們能同時處理技術與帳單諮詢。

toeic.example_en: Please raise any blocker during the daily stand-up so the team can resolve it immediately.
toeic.example_zh: 請在每日站立會議中提出任何阻礙，讓團隊能立即解決。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞-現在分詞) 漸進提升；加速
toeic.example_en: The factory is ramping production to meet unexpectedly strong demand from European retailers.
toeic.example_zh: 工廠正在加速生產，以滿足歐洲零售商出乎意料的強勁需求。

toeic.example_en: We had to deprioritize the mobile redesign in order to focus engineering resources on the API migration.
toeic.example_zh: 我們不得不將行動版重新設計的優先順序降低，以將工程資源集中於 API 遷移。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 規模適中的；調整至適當規模的
toeic.example_en: The right-sized team of five engineers delivered the product faster than the previous group of twelve.
toeic.example_zh: 由五名工程師組成的規模適中團隊比先前的十二人小組更快交付產品。

toeic.example_en: Investing in automation tools has significantly improved operational efficiency across our warehouses.
toeic.example_zh: 投資自動化工具已大幅提升我們倉儲業務的營運效率。

toeic.example_en: Competitive compensation alone is no longer sufficient to ensure long-term talent retention.
toeic.example_zh: 僅靠具競爭力的薪酬已不足以確保長期的人才留任。

toeic.example_en: Effective agenda setting before the quarterly meeting ensures discussions remain focused and productive.
toeic.example_zh: 在季度會議前進行有效的議程設定可確保討論保持聚焦並具生產力。

toeic.example_en: The talent shortage in cybersecurity has driven salaries up by nearly thirty percent in two years.
toeic.example_zh: 網路安全領域的人才短缺已使薪資在兩年內上漲近三成。

toeic.example_en: Each agenda owner should send pre-read materials at least 24 hours before the meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 每位議程負責人應於會議前至少 24 小時寄出預讀資料。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 關鍵障礙；致命問題
toeic.example_en: The data migration error turned out to be a showstopper that delayed the system launch by a week.
toeic.example_zh: 資料遷移錯誤事實上成為致命問題，使系統上線延遲了一週。

toeic.example_en: Unused vacation days are subject to a maximum rollover of five days into the next calendar year.
toeic.example_zh: 未使用的休假日轉入下一日曆年度最多以五天為限。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 營運檢討會議
toeic.example_en: The monthly operational review highlighted three areas where productivity could be substantially improved.
toeic.example_zh: 月度營運檢討會議指出三個生產力可大幅改善的領域。

toeic.example_en: Many employees block out two hours of deep work each morning to focus on strategic tasks.
toeic.example_zh: 許多員工每天早晨保留兩小時的深度工作時間，以專注於策略性任務。

toeic.example_en: We established a weekly meeting cadence with the offshore development team to maintain alignment.
toeic.example_zh: 我們與離岸開發團隊建立每週會議節奏以維持步調一致。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 人才招募策略
toeic.example_en: Our talent acquisition strategy emphasizes diverse hiring and partnerships with regional universities.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的人才招募策略著重於多元化招聘以及與區域大學的合作。

toeic.example_en: Strong people managers are critical to maintaining team morale during periods of rapid change.
toeic.example_zh: 在快速變革時期，優秀的人員主管對維持團隊士氣至關重要。

toeic.example_en: Some employees prefer the individual contributor track over taking on management responsibilities.
toeic.example_zh: 部分員工偏好獨立貢獻者路線，而不願承擔管理職責。

toeic.example_en: Quarterly talent mapping helps leadership identify employees ready for the next career step.
toeic.example_zh: 季度人才盤點協助領導層辨識準備好邁向職涯下一步的員工。

toeic.example_en: Our director holds skip level meetings with junior staff to gather unfiltered feedback.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的總監與基層員工舉行跨層級會議，以收集未經過濾的回饋。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 人才評估會議
toeic.example_en: The annual talent review identified six high-potential employees for accelerated development.
toeic.example_zh: 年度人才評估會議辨識出六位適合加速培養的高潛力員工。

toeic.example_en: Hiring managers look for candidates who demonstrate a growth mindset and willingness to learn.
toeic.example_zh: 招聘主管尋找展現成長型思維且願意學習的候選人。

toeic.example_en: We adopted a standard agenda template to ensure all project meetings cover risks and next steps.
toeic.example_zh: 我們採用標準議程範本，以確保所有專案會議都涵蓋風險與後續步驟。

toeic.example_en: HR conducted a fact-finding interview with each team member before recommending disciplinary action.
toeic.example_zh: 人資在建議懲處措施前對每位團隊成員進行了事實調查訪談。

toeic.example_en: The CEO offered her a stretch assignment leading the company's first international expansion.
toeic.example_zh: 執行長提供她一項挑戰性任務，負責領導公司首次的國際擴張。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 專案受理流程
toeic.example_en: The new project intake process requires a business case and resource estimate before approval.
toeic.example_zh: 新的專案受理流程在核准前要求提交商業論證與資源估算。

toeic.example_en: Resource leveling adjusts the schedule to address conflicts between competing project demands.
toeic.example_zh: 資源平衡調整時程以解決相互競爭的專案需求之間的衝突。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 專案小組；特遣團隊
toeic.example_en: Management assembled a cross-functional task force to address the recurring quality issues.
toeic.example_zh: 管理層組成一個跨職能專案小組以處理一再發生的品質問題。

toeic.example_en: The milestone review at the end of each phase confirms that deliverables meet acceptance criteria.
toeic.example_zh: 每個階段結束時的里程碑檢視確認交付成果符合驗收標準。

toeic.example_en: Projects must pass each stage gate review before receiving additional funding from the steering committee.
toeic.example_zh: 專案必須通過每個階段審核點，才能從指導委員會獲得額外資金。

toeic.example_en: Any deviation from the scope baseline must be approved through a formal change control process.
toeic.example_zh: 任何偏離範圍基準的情況必須經由正式的變更控管流程核准。

toeic.example_en: The team measures progress weekly against the approved schedule baseline.
toeic.example_zh: 團隊每週依據已核准的時程基準衡量進度。

toeic.example_en: We compare actual expenditures against the cost baseline to identify potential overruns early.
toeic.example_zh: 我們將實際支出與成本基準比較，以儘早辨識潛在超支。

toeic.example_en: The project manager updates the issue log daily and reviews open items with stakeholders weekly.
toeic.example_zh: 專案經理每日更新問題紀錄表，並每週與利害關係人檢視未解決項目。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 啟動會議簡報
toeic.example_en: Please review the kickoff deck before tomorrow's session and prepare any clarifying questions.
toeic.example_zh: 請於明日會議前審閱啟動會議簡報，並準備任何需要釐清的問題。

toeic.example_en: Each user story must satisfy the definition of done before it can be marked complete in the sprint.
toeic.example_zh: 每個使用者故事必須滿足完成定義，才能在衝刺中標記為完成。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 衝刺規劃會議
toeic.example_en: Sprint planning takes place every other Monday and typically runs for two hours.
toeic.example_zh: 衝刺規劃會議每隔週一舉行，通常持續兩小時。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 衝刺審查會議
toeic.example_en: Stakeholders attend the sprint review to see demonstrations of newly completed features.
toeic.example_zh: 利害關係人出席衝刺審查會議，觀看新完成功能的演示。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 版本發布管理
toeic.example_en: Effective release management ensures new software versions reach customers without disruption.
toeic.example_zh: 有效的版本發布管理確保新軟體版本能不中斷地交付給客戶。

toeic.example_en: We must guard against feature creep that pushes the launch date beyond our committed deadline.
toeic.example_zh: 我們必須防範功能蔓延導致上線日期超出我們承諾的期限。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 進行或中止的決策
toeic.example_en: The steering committee will make a go/no-go decision on Phase Two next Thursday.
toeic.example_zh: 指導委員會將於下週四對第二階段做出進行或中止的決策。

toeic.example_en: Each tollgate requires sign-off from finance, legal, and the project sponsor.
toeic.example_zh: 每個階段審核關卡都需要財務、法務與專案發起人的簽核。

toeic.example_en: Creating a RACI chart clarified who was responsible, accountable, consulted, and informed for each task.
toeic.example_zh: 建立責任分工圖釐清了每項任務的執行、當責、諮詢與告知對象。

toeic.example_en: The team chose a lift and shift approach to migrate the application to the cloud quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 團隊選擇直接遷移的方式以快速將應用程式遷移至雲端。

toeic.example_en: Decommissioning of the legacy mainframe is scheduled for the third quarter of next year.
toeic.example_zh: 舊主機的退役預定於明年第三季進行。

toeic.example_en: We always prepare a rollback plan in case the deployment causes unexpected production issues.
toeic.example_zh: 我們總是準備回復方案，以防部署造成意外的生產環境問題。

toeic.example_en: Limiting the blast radius of a failed deployment is a key principle of resilient system design.
toeic.example_zh: 限制失敗部署的影響範圍是韌性系統設計的關鍵原則。

toeic.example_en: Each swimlane on the process diagram represents the responsibilities of a different department.
toeic.example_zh: 流程圖上每條泳道代表不同部門的職責。

toeic.example_en: Process mapping workshops helped identify three major bottlenecks in our order fulfillment system.
toeic.example_zh: 流程繪製工作坊協助辨識出我們訂單履行系統中的三個主要瓶頸。

toeic.example_en: During the discovery phase we interviewed twenty users to understand their core needs.
toeic.example_zh: 在探索階段我們訪談了二十位使用者以了解他們的核心需求。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 範圍界定會議
toeic.example_en: The scoping meeting concluded with a clear list of deliverables and exclusions for the engagement.
toeic.example_zh: 範圍界定會議以本次合作的明確交付項目與排除事項清單作結。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞/名詞) 加速處理；快速通道
toeic.example_en: Senior management decided to fast track the new feature to capture market opportunity.
toeic.example_zh: 高層管理決定加速推進新功能以掌握市場機會。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 非例行週期的；計畫外的
toeic.example_en: An off-cycle performance review may be conducted when an employee transfers to a new role.
toeic.example_zh: 當員工調任新職位時，可能進行計畫外的績效檢討。

toeic.example_en: An interim leader will manage the team until a permanent vice president is appointed.
toeic.example_zh: 在常任副總裁任命之前，將由臨時負責人管理該團隊。

toeic.example_en: The acting manager has authority to approve expenses up to ten thousand dollars during the transition.
toeic.example_zh: 代理主管在過渡期間有權核准最高一萬美元的費用支出。

toeic.example_en: Please prepare a detailed transition plan that documents all active projects and key contacts.
toeic.example_zh: 請準備一份詳盡的過渡計畫，記錄所有進行中的專案與重要聯絡人。

toeic.example_en: Three senior directors have been identified as succession candidates for the CFO role.
toeic.example_zh: 三位資深總監已被列為財務長職位的接班候選人。

toeic.example_en: The quarterly townhall meeting gives employees an opportunity to ask leadership candid questions.
toeic.example_zh: 季度全員大會讓員工有機會向領導層提出坦率的問題。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞/名詞) 全員的；全員大會
toeic.example_en: Our all-hands every Friday afternoon shares wins, challenges, and product updates with the entire company.
toeic.example_zh: 每週五下午的全員大會與全公司分享成果、挑戰與產品更新。

toeic.example_en: The CEO hosted a fireside chat with the founder of our newest acquisition to introduce the team.
toeic.example_zh: 執行長與我們最新併購標的的創辦人舉行爐邊談話以介紹其團隊。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 自由提問環節
toeic.example_en: The ask me anything session with the CTO gave engineers a chance to discuss the technical roadmap.
toeic.example_zh: 與技術長的自由提問環節讓工程師有機會討論技術藍圖。

toeic.example_en: We host a monthly lunch and learn featuring guest speakers from various industries.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每月舉辦一次午餐學習會，邀請來自不同產業的客座講者。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 自帶午餐分享會
toeic.example_en: Tomorrow's brown bag session will cover best practices for writing technical documentation.
toeic.example_zh: 明天的自帶午餐分享會將探討撰寫技術文件的最佳實務。

toeic.example_en: Please send me the latest version of the deck so I can review it before the board meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 請寄給我最新版的簡報投影片，我才能在董事會議前審閱。

toeic.example_en: The pre-read for tomorrow's strategy session is attached and should take about thirty minutes to review.
toeic.example_zh: 明日策略會議的會前資料已附上，閱讀約需三十分鐘。

toeic.example_en: A detailed post-read summarizing decisions and action items will be distributed within 24 hours.
toeic.example_zh: 整理決議與行動項目的詳細會後資料將於 24 小時內發送。

toeic.example_en: Please accept the calendar invite to confirm your attendance at the planning workshop.
toeic.example_zh: 請接受行事曆邀請以確認您將出席規劃工作坊。

toeic.example_en: Avoid double-booking conference rooms by checking the availability calendar before sending invites.
toeic.example_zh: 在發送邀請前先檢查可用性日曆，以避免重複預約會議室。

toeic.example_en: A scheduling conflict forced us to move the project review from Wednesday to Friday morning.
toeic.example_zh: 時程衝突迫使我們將專案檢討會議從週三改至週五上午。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞片語) 預先封存時段
toeic.example_en: I will block off two hours on Friday afternoon for focused work on the budget proposal.
toeic.example_zh: 我會在週五下午預先封存兩小時，專心處理預算提案。

toeic.example_en: The security team ran a tabletop exercise to test our response to a simulated data breach scenario.
toeic.example_zh: 資安團隊進行了桌上型演練，以測試我們對模擬資料外洩情境的應變。

toeic.example_en: We always do a dry run of major client presentations the day before to catch any issues.
toeic.example_zh: 我們總是在重要客戶簡報前一天進行預演，以發現任何問題。

toeic.example_en: The departing manager arranged a warm handoff that introduced her successor to every key client personally.
toeic.example_zh: 即將離職的經理安排了妥善交接，親自向每位重要客戶介紹她的繼任者。

toeic.example_en: Each new sales hire follows a 90-day ramp plan with weekly checkpoints to track progress.
toeic.example_zh: 每位新進業務都遵循 90 天上手計畫，每週設置檢核點追蹤進度。

toeic.example_en: Each new engineering manager is paired with an experienced co-pilot for the first six months.
toeic.example_zh: 每位新任工程主管在前六個月會搭配一位資深協同夥伴。

toeic.example_en: Working effectively in a matrix organization requires strong communication across reporting lines.
toeic.example_zh: 在矩陣式組織中有效運作需要跨匯報線的良好溝通。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 虛線匯報關係
toeic.example_en: She has a dotted line reporting relationship to the regional vice president of marketing.
toeic.example_zh: 她與區域行銷副總裁之間有虛線匯報關係。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 實線直屬關係
toeic.example_en: His solid line manager handles performance reviews and approves time off requests.
toeic.example_zh: 他的實線直屬主管負責績效評核並核准請假申請。

toeic.example_en: The reorganization increased each director's span of control from five to eight direct reports.
toeic.example_zh: 組織重整將每位總監的管理幅度從五位直接部屬增加為八位。

toeic.example_en: As a senior manager, she now has twelve direct reports across three different time zones.
toeic.example_zh: 作為資深經理，她現在管理跨三個不同時區的十二位直接部屬。

toeic.example_en: Conducting a skip-level review helps senior leaders identify gaps in middle management performance.
toeic.example_zh: 進行跨層級檢視有助於高階主管辨識中階管理層的績效缺口。

toeic.example_en: People analytics revealed that teams with weekly one-on-ones had significantly higher engagement scores.
toeic.example_zh: 人員分析顯示，每週進行一對一會談的團隊具有明顯較高的敬業度分數。

toeic.example_en: The annual engagement survey provides valuable insight into workplace culture and management effectiveness.
toeic.example_zh: 年度敬業度調查為職場文化與管理效能提供寶貴洞見。

toeic.example_en: We launched a short pulse survey to gauge employee sentiment after the recent reorganization.
toeic.example_zh: 我們推出簡短的脈動調查，以評估近期組織重整後的員工情緒。

toeic.example_en: Strategic workforce planning ensures we have the right skills in place to support business growth.
toeic.example_zh: 策略性人力規劃確保我們具備支援業務成長所需的合適技能。

toeic.example_en: Leadership believes that high talent density drives both innovation and operational excellence.
toeic.example_zh: 領導層認為高人才密度同時驅動創新與營運卓越。

toeic.example_en: Our competency framework defines the skills required at each level of the engineering career path.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的職能架構定義了工程職涯路徑各層級所需的技能。

toeic.example_en: The published career ladder helps employees understand expectations for advancement to the next level.
toeic.example_zh: 已公布的職涯階梯協助員工了解晉升至下一階段的期望。

toeic.example_en: A career lattice supports lateral moves in addition to traditional upward progression.
toeic.example_zh: 職涯網格除支援傳統的向上晉升外，也支持橫向調動。

toeic.example_en: A lateral move to a different team can broaden an employee's skills without changing their job level.
toeic.example_zh: 橫向調動至不同團隊可在不改變員工職級的情況下拓展其技能。

toeic.example_en: The new automation platform represents a step change in how we process customer orders.
toeic.example_zh: 新的自動化平台代表我們處理客戶訂單方式的階躍式變革。

toeic.example_en: Establishing a clear operating cadence with weekly, monthly, and quarterly rhythms keeps teams aligned.
toeic.example_zh: 建立週、月、季的清晰營運節奏可使團隊保持一致。

toeic.example_en: The leadership team's operating rhythm includes a strategy review every six weeks.
toeic.example_zh: 領導團隊的營運節律包括每六週舉行一次策略檢討。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 持續更新清單
toeic.example_en: I keep a running list of open questions to discuss in our next leadership meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 我持續更新一份待討論問題清單，以便在下次領導會議中討論。

toeic.example_en: We added that question to the parking lot to revisit at the end of the workshop.
toeic.example_zh: 我們將該問題放入暫存議題區，待工作坊結束時再回頭討論。

toeic.example_en: Let's do a quick round robin so everyone has a chance to share an update.
toeic.example_zh: 我們快速輪流發言，讓每個人都有機會分享更新。

toeic.example_en: We will split into breakout rooms for thirty minutes to brainstorm solutions in smaller groups.
toeic.example_zh: 我們將分組進入分組討論室三十分鐘，以小組形式腦力激盪解決方案。

toeic.example_en: The facilitator kept the workshop on track and ensured every participant had a chance to contribute.
toeic.example_zh: 引導者使工作坊不偏離主題，並確保每位參與者都有貢獻機會。

toeic.example_en: Please volunteer to serve as scribe so we have a clean record of decisions made today.
toeic.example_zh: 請自願擔任記錄員，讓我們對今天的決議留下完整紀錄。

toeic.example_en: Designating a dedicated note taker at the start of the meeting ensures nothing important is missed.
toeic.example_zh: 在會議開始時指定專屬記錄者可確保不遺漏任何重要事項。

toeic.example_en: Coaching helped him develop the executive presence needed for senior leadership roles.
toeic.example_zh: 教練輔導協助他培養擔任高階領導職務所需的領導風範。

toeic.example_en: A healthy leadership pipeline ensures the company has qualified successors for every key role.
toeic.example_zh: 健全的領導人才庫確保公司每個關鍵職位都有合格的繼任者。

toeic.example_en: Each high-potential employee receives quarterly mentoring from a member of the executive team.
toeic.example_zh: 每位高潛力員工每季接受高階主管團隊成員的指導。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 績效改善計畫
toeic.example_en: After two missed quarters, she was placed on a performance improvement plan with clear monthly targets.
toeic.example_zh: 在連續兩季未達標後，她被列入績效改善計畫，並訂定明確的月度目標。

toeic.example_en: Effective managers deliver corrective feedback promptly while focusing on behavior rather than personality.
toeic.example_zh: 有效的主管會及時提供矯正性回饋，並聚焦於行為而非人格特質。

toeic.example_en: Positive reinforcement encourages employees to repeat behaviors that contribute to team success.
toeic.example_zh: 正向強化鼓勵員工重複那些有助於團隊成功的行為。

toeic.example_en: The behavioral interview asks candidates to describe specific examples from their previous work experience.
toeic.example_zh: 行為面試要求候選人描述其先前工作經驗中的具體例子。

toeic.example_en: We conduct a competency-based interview to assess each candidate against the role's required skills.
toeic.example_zh: 我們進行職能式面試，依職位所需的技能評估每位候選人。

toeic.example_en: The panel interview included three engineers and the hiring manager asking a mix of technical questions.
toeic.example_zh: 小組面試由三位工程師與招聘主管組成，提出綜合的技術問題。

toeic.example_en: Recruiters conduct a 30-minute screening interview to assess basic qualifications and culture fit.
toeic.example_zh: 招聘人員進行 30 分鐘的篩選面試，以評估基本資格與文化適配度。

toeic.example_en: We always complete a reference check before extending a formal offer to a candidate.
toeic.example_zh: 在向候選人發出正式錄取通知前，我們一律完成推薦人查核。

toeic.example_en: The offer letter will detail your salary, benefits, start date, and any signing bonus.
toeic.example_zh: 錄取通知書將詳列您的薪資、福利、報到日期與任何簽約獎金。

toeic.example_en: Her compensation package includes base salary, performance bonus, and a stock option grant.
toeic.example_zh: 她的薪酬方案包含底薪、績效獎金以及股票選擇權授予。

toeic.example_en: The base salary for this position is competitive within the regional technology market.
toeic.example_zh: 此職位的底薪在區域科技市場中具有競爭力。

toeic.example_en: The signing bonus is paid in two installments at the start and end of the first year.
toeic.example_zh: 簽約獎金分兩期支付，分別於第一年的開始與結束時發放。

toeic.example_en: Key employees received a retention bonus to encourage them to stay through the merger transition.
toeic.example_zh: 關鍵員工獲得留任獎金，以鼓勵他們在併購過渡期間留下。

toeic.example_en: The annual bonus is determined based on both individual performance and overall company results.
toeic.example_zh: 年度獎金依據個人績效與公司整體業績共同決定。

toeic.example_en: Sales representatives are eligible for a quarterly performance bonus when they exceed their targets.
toeic.example_zh: 業務代表在超過目標時可獲得季度績效獎金。

toeic.example_en: Managers can award a spot bonus to recognize exceptional effort on a specific project.
toeic.example_zh: 主管可頒發即時獎金，以表彰某特定專案上的傑出表現。

toeic.example_en: Each director receives an annual stock grant that vests over a four-year period.
toeic.example_zh: 每位總監每年獲得分四年歸屬的股票授予。

toeic.example_en: Equity compensation aligns employee incentives with long-term company performance.
toeic.example_zh: 股權報酬使員工激勵與公司長期績效保持一致。

toeic.example_en: Total cash compensation includes base salary plus any cash bonuses earned during the year.
toeic.example_zh: 現金總薪酬包含底薪以及年內賺取的任何現金獎金。

toeic.example_en: Senior executives may participate in a deferred compensation plan that defers tax obligations.
toeic.example_zh: 高階主管可參加遞延薪酬計畫，延遲稅務義務。

toeic.example_en: Top performers receive a merit increase of up to seven percent during the annual review cycle.
toeic.example_zh: 績優員工在年度檢視週期中可獲得最高百分之七的加薪。

toeic.example_en: The cost of living adjustment this year will be based on the regional consumer price index.
toeic.example_zh: 今年的生活費調整將以區域消費者物價指數為依據。

toeic.example_en: Each role is assigned a salary band that defines the minimum and maximum compensation levels.
toeic.example_zh: 每個職位被歸入一個薪資區間，定義薪酬的最低與最高水準。

toeic.example_en: Annual pay equity audits help ensure that compensation is fair across gender and ethnicity.
toeic.example_zh: 年度薪酬公平稽核有助於確保不同性別與族群間的薪酬公平。

toeic.example_en: Compensation decisions must consider internal equity to avoid creating tension within teams.
toeic.example_zh: 薪酬決策必須考慮內部公平性，以避免在團隊內部造成緊張。

toeic.example_en: External benchmarking ensures our compensation packages remain competitive in the marketplace.
toeic.example_zh: 外部對標確保我們的薪酬方案在市場上保持競爭力。

toeic.example_en: A stay interview is conducted with top performers to understand what keeps them engaged.
toeic.example_zh: 對績優員工進行留任訪談，以了解是什麼讓他們保持投入。

toeic.example_en: Voluntary turnover among engineers has dropped from twenty to twelve percent year over year.
toeic.example_zh: 工程師的自願離職率已從去年的百分之二十下降至百分之十二。

toeic.example_en: Involuntary turnover includes terminations for performance issues or position eliminations.
toeic.example_zh: 非自願離職包括因績效問題或職位裁撤而被解雇的情況。

toeic.example_en: Tracking regrettable attrition helps the company focus retention efforts on its most valuable employees.
toeic.example_zh: 追蹤遺憾性流失有助於公司將留才努力集中於最具價值的員工。

toeic.example_en: A boomerang employee returning after two years often brings valuable external perspectives.
toeic.example_zh: 在離開兩年後回鍋的員工通常能帶來寶貴的外部觀點。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 校友網絡；前員工網絡
toeic.example_en: Our alumni network keeps former employees connected and often serves as a source for rehiring.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的前員工網絡使離職員工保持聯繫，並常成為回聘的來源。

toeic.example_en: Senior executives departing the company received a generous exit package including continued health benefits.
toeic.example_zh: 離開公司的高階主管獲得包含延續健康福利在內的優厚離職方案。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 競業禁止協議
toeic.example_en: The non-compete agreement restricts the executive from joining a direct competitor for twelve months.
toeic.example_zh: 競業禁止協議限制該主管在十二個月內不得加入直接競爭對手。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 帶薪離職休假
toeic.example_en: He was placed on garden leave for three months while still being paid full salary and benefits.
toeic.example_zh: 他被安排了為期三個月的帶薪離職休假，仍領取全額薪資與福利。

toeic.example_en: Employees are expected to serve a thirty-day notice period before their last day of employment.
toeic.example_zh: 員工在最後上班日前須履行三十天的預告期。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 視同解僱；推定解雇
toeic.example_en: The employee filed a constructive dismissal claim alleging that working conditions had become intolerable.
toeic.example_zh: 該員工提出視同解僱的申訴，主張工作條件已變得無法忍受。

toeic.example_en: Under at-will employment, either party may terminate the relationship at any time without cause.
toeic.example_zh: 在任意僱用制下，任何一方可在任何時間無須理由終止雇傭關係。

toeic.example_en: All new hires complete a 90-day probationary period before becoming eligible for full benefits.
toeic.example_zh: 所有新進員工須完成 90 天試用期，才有資格享有完整福利。

toeic.example_en: She was hired on a fixed-term contract to cover a colleague's twelve-month parental leave.
toeic.example_zh: 她以定期契約僱用，以代理一位同事為期十二個月的育嬰假。

toeic.example_en: After successful completion of her contract, she was offered an indefinite contract as a permanent employee.
toeic.example_zh: 在成功完成合約後，她獲得轉為正職的不定期契約。

toeic.example_en: A zero-hour contract offers no guaranteed hours, providing flexibility for both worker and employer.
toeic.example_zh: 零工時契約不保證工時，為雇主與員工雙方提供彈性。

toeic.example_en: Some employees choose a compressed workweek of four ten-hour days instead of five eight-hour days.
toeic.example_zh: 部分員工選擇每日十小時、共四天的壓縮工作週，而非每日八小時、共五天。

toeic.example_en: Our flex time policy allows employees to start their workday anytime between seven and ten in the morning.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的彈性工時政策允許員工在早上七點至十點之間任何時間開始上班。

toeic.example_en: Two part-time employees in a job sharing arrangement together cover a single full-time role.
toeic.example_zh: 兩位以工作分擔方式合作的兼職員工共同負責一份全職職務。

toeic.example_en: After ten years of service, employees are eligible for a paid four-week sabbatical.
toeic.example_zh: 在服務滿十年後，員工有資格享有四週的帶薪長假。

toeic.example_en: Our enhanced parental leave policy provides sixteen weeks of paid time off for new parents.
toeic.example_zh: 我們強化後的育嬰假政策為新生兒父母提供十六週的帶薪假期。

toeic.example_en: Employees may take up to five days of bereavement leave following the death of an immediate family member.
toeic.example_zh: 員工在直系親屬過世後可請最多五天的喪假。

toeic.example_en: Managers can approve compassionate leave when an employee needs to care for a seriously ill family member.
toeic.example_zh: 當員工需照顧重病家屬時，主管可核准慈悲假。

toeic.example_en: Employees serving jury duty continue to receive their regular salary while away from work.
toeic.example_zh: 履行陪審義務的員工在離開工作期間仍可領取正常薪資。

toeic.example_en: Each employee is entitled to three personal days per year in addition to vacation time.
toeic.example_zh: 除休假之外，每位員工每年另享有三天個人假。

toeic.example_en: A floating holiday gives employees flexibility to observe cultural or religious days not on the calendar.
toeic.example_zh: 機動假日讓員工有彈性慶祝行事曆未列出的文化或宗教節日。

toeic.example_en: Our paid time off policy combines vacation, sick leave, and personal days into a single bank.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的帶薪休假政策將休假、病假與個人假合併為單一假別。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 無上限帶薪假
toeic.example_en: Our unlimited PTO policy trusts employees to take the time they need to rest and recharge.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的無上限帶薪假政策信任員工自行安排所需的休息與充電時間。

toeic.example_en: My calendar is packed with back-to-back meetings today, so please send any updates by email.
toeic.example_zh: 我今天的行程排滿了連場會議，所以請以電子郵件傳送任何更新。

toeic.example_en: Many remote workers experience meeting fatigue after spending entire days on video calls.
toeic.example_zh: 許多遠端工作者在整天視訊通話後會感到會議疲勞。

toeic.example_en: We introduced a no-meeting day every Wednesday to give employees uninterrupted time for focused work.
toeic.example_zh: 我們設立每週三為無會議日，讓員工有不受打擾的時間專注工作。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 開放溝通政策
toeic.example_en: The CEO maintains an open door policy and welcomes employees at all levels to share their ideas.
toeic.example_zh: 執行長維持開放溝通政策，歡迎各層級員工分享想法。

toeic.example_en: Every employee should be able to deliver a clear elevator speech about what our company does.
toeic.example_zh: 每位員工都應能就公司業務做出清楚的電梯簡報。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 價值主張聲明
toeic.example_en: Our value proposition statement was refined after extensive customer interviews and competitive analysis.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的價值主張聲明在大量客戶訪談與競爭分析後得到精修。

toeic.example_en: Each director's scope of authority is documented in the company's delegation of authority matrix.
toeic.example_zh: 每位總監的職權範圍記錄於公司的授權矩陣中。

toeic.example_en: The delegation of authority matrix specifies who can approve expenditures at each spending threshold.
toeic.example_zh: 授權範圍矩陣明確規定各支出門檻下誰有權核准。

toeic.example_en: Purchases above the approval threshold of fifty thousand dollars require board ratification.
toeic.example_zh: 超過五萬美元核准門檻的採購需要董事會批准。

toeic.example_en: Only directors and above have sign-off authority for international travel expense reports.
toeic.example_zh: 僅總監及以上職位擁有國際出差費用報告的簽核權限。

toeic.example_en: An exception approval from the finance director is required for any out-of-policy travel booking.
toeic.example_zh: 任何超出政策的旅行預訂都需財務總監的例外核准。

toeic.example_en: Requests for a policy exception must include a detailed business justification and risk assessment.
toeic.example_zh: 申請政策例外時必須附上詳細的業務理由與風險評估。

toeic.example_en: The compliance officer reviews all marketing materials to ensure they meet regulatory requirements.
toeic.example_zh: 法令遵循長審查所有行銷素材，以確保符合法規要求。

toeic.example_en: The internal auditor identified three control weaknesses during the quarterly procurement review.
toeic.example_zh: 內部稽核員在季度採購檢視中發現三項控制弱點。

toeic.example_en: Our control framework defines the policies and procedures that mitigate financial and operational risks.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的控制架構定義了降低財務與營運風險的政策與程序。

toeic.example_en: The board defined the company's risk appetite for new market expansion at the beginning of the year.
toeic.example_zh: 董事會於年初定義了公司對新市場擴張的風險承受度。

toeic.example_en: A conservative risk tolerance led management to defer the proposed acquisition.
toeic.example_zh: 保守的風險容忍度使管理層決定延後該項擬議併購案。

toeic.example_en: Each entry in the risk register has a designated risk owner responsible for tracking mitigation.
toeic.example_zh: 風險登錄表中的每項條目都有指定的風險負責人，負責追蹤緩解措施。

toeic.example_en: The risk heat map visualizes likelihood and impact, helping leadership prioritize their response.
toeic.example_zh: 風險熱圖以可能性與影響呈現，協助領導層排定應對優先順序。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 關鍵風險指標
toeic.example_en: Tracking key risk indicators allows the team to take action before issues escalate into crises.
toeic.example_zh: 追蹤關鍵風險指標讓團隊能在問題升級為危機前採取行動。

toeic.example_en: The new operating model centralizes shared services while keeping front-line teams close to customers.
toeic.example_zh: 新的營運模式集中共享服務，同時讓第一線團隊貼近客戶。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 目標營運模式
toeic.example_en: Leadership unveiled the target operating model and a three-year roadmap to reach it.
toeic.example_zh: 領導層公布目標營運模式以及達成它的三年路徑圖。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 共享服務中心
toeic.example_en: Consolidating finance operations into a shared service center reduced costs by twenty percent.
toeic.example_zh: 將財務作業整合至共享服務中心使成本降低了百分之二十。

toeic.example_en: Our analytics center of excellence supports business units across the entire enterprise.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的分析卓越中心支援整個企業內的各業務單位。

toeic.example_en: Adopting lean operations principles eliminated waste and improved cycle times by thirty percent.
toeic.example_zh: 採用精實營運原則消除了浪費，並使週期時間改善了百分之三十。

toeic.example_en: A culture of continuous learning helps employees adapt to rapidly changing market conditions.
toeic.example_zh: 持續學習的文化有助於員工適應快速變化的市場環境。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 知識傳承計畫
toeic.example_en: Before her retirement, the senior engineer documented a thorough knowledge transfer plan.
toeic.example_zh: 資深工程師在退休前撰寫了一份完整的知識傳承計畫。

toeic.example_en: A strong knowledge management system reduces duplication and accelerates onboarding for new hires.
toeic.example_zh: 強健的知識管理系統可減少重複工作並加速新進員工上手。

toeic.example_en: Converting tribal knowledge into written documentation reduces dependency on individual employees.
toeic.example_zh: 將部落式知識轉化為書面文件可降低對個別員工的依賴。

toeic.example_en: Cross-training reduces the risk of having a single point of failure on any critical business process.
toeic.example_zh: 交叉訓練可降低任何關鍵業務流程上出現單點故障的風險。

toeic.example_en: The HR director presented a succession risk analysis for all critical leadership positions.
toeic.example_zh: 人資總監針對所有關鍵領導職位提交了接班風險分析。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 關鍵人員風險
toeic.example_en: Key person risk is reduced by documenting processes and developing multiple subject matter experts.
toeic.example_zh: 透過記錄流程與培養多位主題專家可降低關鍵人員風險。

toeic.example_en: We consulted the subject matter expert on tax regulations before finalizing our international structure.
toeic.example_zh: 在敲定國際架構前，我們諮詢了稅務法規方面的主題專家。

toeic.example_en: Hiring a domain expert helped accelerate our entry into the medical device market.
toeic.example_zh: 聘請領域專家加速了我們進入醫療器材市場的腳步。

toeic.example_en: Her chief of staff acts as a thought partner who challenges assumptions and explores alternatives.
toeic.example_zh: 她的幕僚長扮演思考夥伴，挑戰假設並探索替代方案。

toeic.example_en: Over fifteen years, our outside counsel has become a trusted advisor to the entire executive team.
toeic.example_zh: 在過去十五年中，我們的外部法律顧問已成為整個高階主管團隊的信任顧問。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 高階主管教練
toeic.example_en: She works with an executive coach monthly to develop her strategic leadership capabilities.
toeic.example_zh: 她每月與一位高階主管教練合作，培養策略性領導能力。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 領導教練輔導
toeic.example_en: Leadership coaching helps new managers transition successfully from individual contributor roles.
toeic.example_zh: 領導教練輔導協助新任主管順利從獨立貢獻者角色過渡。

toeic.example_en: Creating a tight feedback loop with customers helps the product team prioritize improvements quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 與客戶建立緊密的回饋迴路有助於產品團隊快速排定改善的優先順序。

toeic.example_en: Effective managers deliver constructive criticism in a way that motivates rather than discourages.
toeic.example_zh: 有效的主管以激勵而非打擊的方式提供建設性批評。

toeic.example_en: Active listening skills are essential for managers who need to understand their team members deeply.
toeic.example_zh: 積極傾聽的技巧對需要深入了解團隊成員的主管至關重要。

toeic.example_en: Coaches use open-ended questions to encourage deeper reflection rather than simple yes-or-no answers.
toeic.example_zh: 教練使用開放式問題鼓勵更深層的反思，而非僅給出是或否的答案。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 深入探討會議
toeic.example_en: Tomorrow's deep dive session will explore the root causes of customer churn over the past quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 明天的深入探討會議將探究過去一季客戶流失的根本原因。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 策略外宿會議
toeic.example_en: The leadership team's annual strategy offsite produced clear priorities for the next three years.
toeic.example_zh: 領導團隊的年度策略外宿會議產出未來三年的明確優先事項。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 領導力研習營
toeic.example_en: The two-day leadership retreat focused on team dynamics, communication, and strategic alignment.
toeic.example_zh: 為期兩天的領導力研習營聚焦於團隊動態、溝通與策略一致性。

toeic.example_en: Before launching the campaign, marketing held an alignment meeting with sales and customer support.
toeic.example_zh: 在推出活動前，行銷部與業務及客服舉行共識會議。

toeic.example_en: The weekly synchronization meeting keeps our distributed teams informed about each other's progress.
toeic.example_zh: 每週同步會議讓分散的團隊互相了解彼此的進度。

toeic.example_en: The project's decision log captures every major choice and the reasoning behind it.
toeic.example_zh: 專案的決策紀錄保留了每項重大選擇及其背後的理由。

toeic.example_en: Defining decision rights up front prevents confusion and delays during project execution.
toeic.example_zh: 事先定義決策權可避免專案執行過程中的混亂與延誤。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) RAPID 決策框架
toeic.example_en: We use the RAPID framework to assign roles of Recommend, Agree, Perform, Input, and Decide.
toeic.example_zh: 我們使用 RAPID 框架來分配建議、同意、執行、提供意見與決定的角色。

toeic.example_en: He found an accountability partner who helps him stay on track with his quarterly development goals.
toeic.example_zh: 他找到一位責任夥伴，協助他持續達成季度發展目標。

toeic.example_en: Cultivating an ownership mindset encourages employees to take initiative beyond their formal role.
toeic.example_zh: 培養主人翁心態能鼓勵員工在正式職責之外採取主動。

toeic.example_en: A bias for action helps teams move quickly while avoiding analysis paralysis.
toeic.example_zh: 行動偏好幫助團隊快速推進並避免分析癱瘓。

toeic.example_en: Avoid analysis paralysis by setting a clear decision deadline at the start of every review.
toeic.example_zh: 在每次檢視之初設定明確的決策截止日，以避免分析癱瘓。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 第一性原理思考
toeic.example_en: Applying first principles thinking led the team to challenge assumptions and discover novel solutions.
toeic.example_zh: 運用第一性原理思考使團隊挑戰假設並發現新穎的解決方案。

toeic.example_en: Systems thinking helps leaders understand how different parts of the organization interact and influence each other.
toeic.example_zh: 系統思考幫助領導者理解組織各部分之間如何互動與相互影響。

toeic.example_en: The executive development program emphasizes strategic thinking and long-term decision making.
toeic.example_zh: 高階主管發展計畫強調策略思考與長期決策。

toeic.example_en: Critical thinking enables analysts to identify flawed assumptions and challenge conventional wisdom.
toeic.example_zh: 批判性思考使分析師能辨識有缺陷的假設並挑戰傳統觀點。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 創意問題解決
toeic.example_en: Workshops on creative problem solving help teams find innovative approaches to long-standing challenges.
toeic.example_zh: 創意問題解決工作坊協助團隊找出對長期挑戰的創新方法。

toeic.example_en: The team conducted war gaming exercises to anticipate competitor responses to the new product launch.
toeic.example_zh: 團隊進行沙盤推演，以預測競爭對手對新產品上市的回應。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 紅隊；對抗演練團隊
toeic.example_en: A red team challenged the proposed strategy by identifying weaknesses an external competitor might exploit.
toeic.example_zh: 紅隊辨識外部競爭對手可能利用的弱點以挑戰所提出的策略。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 藍隊；防禦團隊
toeic.example_en: The blue team defends the organization by detecting and responding to simulated cyberattacks.
toeic.example_zh: 藍隊透過偵測與回應模擬網路攻擊來保衛組織。

toeic.example_en: We agreed to table the discussion until additional data could be gathered next week.
toeic.example_zh: 我們同意暫緩討論，直到下週能取得更多資料為止。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞片語) 會後私下處理
toeic.example_en: Let's take that conversation offline so we can stay focused on the meeting's main agenda.
toeic.example_zh: 我們把那段對話留到會後處理，以便聚焦於會議主議程。

toeic.example_en: Please save five minutes at the end of the session for a brief wrap-up and next steps.
toeic.example_zh: 請在會議結束前保留五分鐘做簡短的總結與後續步驟。

toeic.example_en: Before we end, let's confirm the next steps and identify owners for each action item.
toeic.example_zh: 在結束前，讓我們確認後續步驟並指派每項行動項目的負責人。

toeic.example_en: I've prepared a one-page document with talking points for tomorrow's media interview.
toeic.example_zh: 我為明天的媒體採訪準備了一頁談話要點文件。

toeic.example_en: The messaging document ensures all spokespersons communicate consistently with external audiences.
toeic.example_zh: 訊息文件確保所有發言人對外溝通時保持一致。

toeic.example_en: A detailed communication plan accompanies every major organizational change initiative.
toeic.example_zh: 每項重大組織變革計畫都會搭配一份詳盡的溝通計畫。

toeic.example_en: Each department appointed a change champion to support the rollout of the new HR system.
toeic.example_zh: 每個部門指派了一位變革推動者，以支援新人資系統的推行。

toeic.example_en: She is recognized as a change agent who has successfully led three major business transformations.
toeic.example_zh: 她被視為變革推動者，曾成功領導三次重大業務轉型。

toeic.example_en: Employees experiencing change fatigue may resist even well-intended new initiatives.
toeic.example_zh: 經歷變革疲勞的員工可能會抗拒即使是立意良善的新方案。

toeic.example_en: Addressing resistance to change requires empathy, clear communication, and visible leadership support.
toeic.example_zh: 處理變革抗拒需要同理心、清晰溝通與明顯的領導支持。

toeic.example_en: The adoption rate of the new collaboration platform reached eighty percent within sixty days.
toeic.example_zh: 新協作平台的採用率在六十天內達到百分之八十。

toeic.example_en: Driving user adoption is just as important as launching new technology successfully.
toeic.example_zh: 推動使用者採用與成功推出新科技同等重要。

toeic.example_en: Lasting behavior change requires consistent reinforcement over many months, not a single training session.
toeic.example_zh: 持久的行為改變需要數個月的持續強化，而非僅一次訓練。

toeic.example_en: The team chose monthly active users as their north star metric to guide product decisions.
toeic.example_zh: 團隊選擇月活躍使用者數作為其指導產品決策的北極星指標。

toeic.example_en: Pipeline value is a leading metric that predicts revenue growth two quarters ahead.
toeic.example_zh: 業務管道價值是預測未來兩季營收成長的領先指標。

toeic.example_en: Customer satisfaction is a lagging metric that reflects the cumulative effect of earlier service decisions.
toeic.example_zh: 客戶滿意度是反映先前服務決策累積效應的落後指標。

toeic.example_en: Page views can be a vanity metric if they do not translate into customer engagement or revenue.
toeic.example_zh: 若未能轉化為客戶參與或營收，網頁瀏覽數就可能成為虛榮指標。

toeic.example_en: The monthly scorecard review evaluates performance across financial, customer, and operational metrics.
toeic.example_zh: 月度計分卡檢視評估財務、客戶與營運指標的績效。

toeic.example_en: The performance dashboard displays real-time data on every key business metric.
toeic.example_zh: 績效儀表板即時顯示每項關鍵業務指標的資料。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 數據驅動決策
toeic.example_en: Investments in analytics tools have enabled true data-driven decision making across the company.
toeic.example_zh: 對分析工具的投資已使整個公司能進行真正的數據驅動決策。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 以證據為基礎的
toeic.example_en: Our HR team takes an evidence-based approach when designing employee development programs.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的人資團隊在設計員工發展計畫時採取以證據為基礎的方法。

toeic.example_en: Please remit the outstanding balance to our bank account within fourteen business days to avoid late fees.
toeic.example_zh: 請在十四個工作天內將未付餘額匯入我們的銀行帳戶，以免產生滯納金。

toeic.example_en: The treasurer will disburse the approved funds to each department once the quarterly budget is finalized.
toeic.example_zh: 出納在季度預算定案後會將核准的款項撥付給各部門。

toeic.example_en: All loan disbursements require dual authorization from the branch manager and the regional credit officer.
toeic.example_zh: 所有放款撥款都需要分行經理與區域信貸主管雙重授權。

toeic.example_en: The capital outlay for the new manufacturing facility exceeded initial projections by nearly fifteen percent.
toeic.example_zh: 新製造廠的資本支出超出最初預估將近百分之十五。

toeic.example_en: The board approved a special appropriation to fund the digital transformation initiative across all divisions.
toeic.example_zh: 董事會核准了一筆專款，用以資助各部門的數位轉型計畫。

toeic.example_en: Interest will accrue daily on any outstanding balance carried beyond the statement due date.
toeic.example_zh: 任何超過對帳單到期日的未付餘額將每日累計利息。

toeic.example_en: Executive remuneration is reviewed annually by an independent committee to ensure alignment with shareholder interests.
toeic.example_zh: 高階主管薪酬每年由獨立委員會審核，以確保與股東利益一致。

toeic.example_en: Maintaining adequate solvency is essential for any insurer expecting to honor long-term policy obligations.
toeic.example_zh: 維持足夠的償付能力對任何預期履行長期保單義務的保險公司至關重要。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 無力償債的；破產的
toeic.example_en: The auditors warned that the subsidiary would become insolvent without an immediate capital injection from the parent company.
toeic.example_zh: 審計師警告，若母公司不立即注資，子公司將陷入無力償債的狀態。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 有信用的；信用良好的
toeic.example_en: Only creditworthy borrowers qualify for our preferred lending program with reduced interest rates and waived fees.
toeic.example_zh: 只有信用良好的借款人才能參加我們減息免費的優惠貸款方案。

toeic.example_en: Banks assess creditworthiness using a combination of credit history, debt-to-income ratio, and employment stability.
toeic.example_zh: 銀行透過信用紀錄、債務收入比與就業穩定性綜合評估信用度。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 拖欠的；逾期未付的
toeic.example_en: Accounts that remain delinquent for more than ninety days are referred to our collections department for follow-up.
toeic.example_zh: 逾期超過九十天的帳戶將轉交我們的催收部門跟進處理。

toeic.example_en: Mortgage delinquency rates rose sharply during the economic downturn but have since returned to historical averages.
toeic.example_zh: 房貸逾期率在經濟衰退期間急遽上升，但目前已回到歷史平均水準。

toeic.example_en: The tenant fell into arrears on rent payments after losing employment and faced potential eviction proceedings.
toeic.example_zh: 房客失業後租金陷入拖欠，並面臨可能的驅逐程序。

toeic.example_en: Employees who resign before the vesting date will forfeit any unvested portion of their equity grant.
toeic.example_zh: 在歸屬日前離職的員工將喪失其股權獎勵中尚未歸屬的部分。

toeic.example_en: The forfeiture clause stipulates that the deposit becomes non-refundable if the buyer withdraws after due diligence.
toeic.example_zh: 沒收條款規定買方在盡職調查後撤回交易，則訂金將不予退還。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 去槓桿化；降低負債
toeic.example_en: Many banks were forced to deleverage their balance sheets following the new regulatory capital requirements.
toeic.example_zh: 在新的監管資本要求下，許多銀行被迫降低資產負債表上的槓桿。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 重組資本結構；增資
toeic.example_en: The struggling firm plans to recapitalize by issuing new equity and retiring a portion of its outstanding debt.
toeic.example_zh: 這家陷入困境的公司計劃透過發行新股並償還部分未償債務以重組資本結構。

toeic.example_en: The fund manager was forced to liquidate several holdings to meet unexpected investor redemption requests.
toeic.example_zh: 基金經理被迫變賣數項持股以應付投資人意外的贖回請求。

toeic.example_en: Creditors received only thirty cents on the dollar after the company's liquidation proceedings concluded last quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 在公司清算程序於上季結束後，債權人每一美元僅取回三十美分。

toeic.example_en: Holding sufficient liquid assets allows a business to cover short-term obligations without selling long-term investments.
toeic.example_zh: 持有足夠的流動資產讓企業能支付短期義務而不必出售長期投資。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 非流動的；難以變現的
toeic.example_en: Private equity investments are highly illiquid and typically lock up investor capital for seven to ten years.
toeic.example_zh: 私募股權投資流動性極低，通常會將投資人資金鎖定七到十年。

toeic.example_en: The company will remunerate the consultants based on a milestone-driven schedule rather than monthly retainers.
toeic.example_zh: 公司將根據里程碑驅動的時程而非每月聘金來給付顧問酬金。

toeic.example_en: Many small businesses remain underinsured against cyber risks despite a sharp increase in ransomware incidents.
toeic.example_zh: 儘管勒索軟體事件大幅增加，許多小型企業對網路風險仍保額不足。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 可扣除的；演繹的
toeic.example_en: Charitable contributions made to qualifying organizations are generally deductive on individual federal tax returns.
toeic.example_zh: 對符合資格組織的慈善捐款通常可在聯邦個人稅申報中扣除。

toeic.example_en: The court ordered the employer to garnishee a portion of the debtor's wages until the judgment is satisfied.
toeic.example_zh: 法院命令雇主扣押債務人部分薪資，直至判決金額清償完畢。

toeic.example_en: Primary carriers often reinsure catastrophic risks with global reinsurers to limit their maximum potential losses.
toeic.example_zh: 原保險公司常將巨災風險向全球再保險公司分保以限制最大潛在損失。

toeic.example_en: Pension obligations are calculated using actuarial assumptions about mortality, interest rates, and future salary growth.
toeic.example_zh: 退休金義務是依據死亡率、利率與未來薪資成長等精算假設計算。

toeic.example_en: The premium payable for comprehensive coverage rose by eight percent due to higher anticipated claim frequencies.
toeic.example_zh: 因預期理賠頻率提高，綜合保險的應付保費上漲了百分之八。

toeic.example_en: Professional indemnity insurance protects consultants from financial losses arising from alleged negligence in their services.
toeic.example_zh: 專業責任保險保護顧問免受其服務中疑似疏失所引起的財務損失。

toeic.example_en: After paying the claim, the insurer pursued subrogation against the third party responsible for the accident.
toeic.example_zh: 保險公司支付理賠後，向造成事故的第三方行使代位求償權。

toeic.example_en: The loss adjuster visited the damaged warehouse to assess inventory destruction and verify the policyholder's claim amount.
toeic.example_zh: 理賠勘查員前往受損倉庫評估存貨毀損並核實保戶的理賠金額。

toeic.example_en: Please submit the completed claim form along with original receipts within thirty days of the incident.
toeic.example_zh: 請在事件發生後三十天內提交填妥的索賠表單及收據正本。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 附加條款；批註條款
toeic.example_en: The rider clause adds coverage for valuable jewelry that exceeds the standard policy limit.
toeic.example_zh: 附加條款將超過標準保單限額的貴重珠寶納入承保範圍。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 除外條款；不保事項
toeic.example_en: Read the exclusion section carefully because acts of war and intentional damage are typically not covered.
toeic.example_zh: 請仔細閱讀除外條款，因為戰爭行為和故意損害通常不在承保範圍內。

toeic.example_en: Under the co-insurance arrangement, the insured pays twenty percent of all medical costs above the deductible.
toeic.example_zh: 在共同保險安排下，被保險人負擔自負額以上所有醫療費用的百分之二十。

toeic.example_en: Stricter underwriting standards introduced after the financial crisis significantly reduced default rates on new mortgages.
toeic.example_zh: 金融危機後實施的更嚴格核保標準大幅降低了新房貸的違約率。

toeic.example_en: Extra monthly payments are applied directly to the principal balance, reducing total interest paid over time.
toeic.example_zh: 額外的月付款直接用於本金餘額，減少長期支付的總利息。

toeic.example_en: Early principal repayment on the loan may incur a prepayment penalty during the first five years.
toeic.example_zh: 在前五年提前償還貸款本金可能會產生提前還款違約金。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 貸款撥放；發放貸款
toeic.example_en: Loan origination volumes declined sharply when central bank rate hikes pushed mortgage rates above seven percent.
toeic.example_zh: 當央行升息將房貸利率推升至百分之七以上時，貸款撥放量急遽下降。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 貸款服務；貸款管理
toeic.example_en: Our loan servicing team handles billing, escrow management, and customer support throughout the life of each mortgage.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的貸款服務團隊在每筆房貸的存續期間負責帳單、託管管理與客戶支援。

toeic.example_en: The escrow agent holds the buyer's deposit in trust until all closing conditions have been fully satisfied.
toeic.example_zh: 託管代理人代為保管買方訂金，直到所有交割條件全部達成。

toeic.example_en: The covenant breach triggered an immediate review of the credit facility and possible acceleration of the outstanding loan.
toeic.example_zh: 違反契約條款引發了對信貸額度的立即審查及未償貸款可能加速到期。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 公司債券；信用債券
toeic.example_en: The company issued unsecured debentures to long-term institutional investors at an attractive fixed coupon rate.
toeic.example_zh: 公司向長期機構投資人發行了具有吸引力固定票息率的無擔保公司債。

toeic.example_en: The bond indenture specifies all rights of bondholders and obligations of the issuer until final maturity.
toeic.example_zh: 債券契約明定債券持有人的所有權利及發行人到期前的義務。

toeic.example_en: The issuer set up a sinking fund to gradually retire portions of the bond before its scheduled maturity.
toeic.example_zh: 發行人設立了償債基金，以在預定到期前逐步償還部分債券。

toeic.example_en: We amortize the goodwill from the acquisition over a fifteen-year period using the straight-line method.
toeic.example_zh: 我們以直線法在十五年期間攤銷該收購所產生的商譽。

toeic.example_en: Office equipment will depreciate over five years, while computer hardware uses a three-year useful life.
toeic.example_zh: 辦公設備將以五年折舊，而電腦硬體則採用三年使用年限。

toeic.example_en: Real estate in the metropolitan area continued to appreciate despite rising interest rates and slower transaction volumes.
toeic.example_zh: 儘管利率上升且交易量放緩，都會區的不動產持續增值。

toeic.example_en: Each ledger entry must include a date, account code, description, and matching debit and credit amounts.
toeic.example_zh: 每筆分類帳分錄必須包含日期、會計科目代碼、摘要及相應的借貸金額。

toeic.example_en: Accountants reconcile bank statements with general ledger balances at the end of each accounting period.
toeic.example_zh: 會計師在每個會計期間結束時將銀行對帳單與總帳餘額進行對帳。

toeic.example_en: Monthly bank reconciliation revealed an unrecorded wire transfer that required immediate investigation by the finance team.
toeic.example_zh: 每月的銀行對帳發現一筆未入帳的電匯，需要財務團隊立即調查。

toeic.example_en: Petty cash funds are limited to small office purchases and must be reimbursed against original itemized receipts.
toeic.example_zh: 零用金僅限用於辦公室小額採購，須憑詳列項目的收據正本核銷。

toeic.example_en: Each voucher payable must be approved by a manager before the disbursement department processes the payment.
toeic.example_zh: 每張應付憑證必須先經主管核准，撥款部門才會處理付款。

toeic.example_en: Please email a copy of the remittance advice so we can apply the payment to the correct invoice.
toeic.example_zh: 請以電子郵件寄送匯款通知副本，以便我們將款項對應到正確的發票。

toeic.example_en: The controller ran a trial close to identify reconciliation issues before the official month-end financial reporting.
toeic.example_zh: 財務主管執行試算結算，以在正式月底財報前找出對帳問題。

toeic.example_en: Our month-end close cycle takes five business days from cutoff to delivery of the management reports.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的月末結帳週期從截止日到管理報表交付需五個工作天。

toeic.example_en: Year-end close requires additional adjustments for accruals, deferrals, and final inventory counts at all locations.
toeic.example_zh: 年終結帳需要對應計、遞延以及各地點最終存貨盤點進行額外調整。

toeic.example_en: Strong internal controls reduce the risk of fraud and ensure the reliability of published financial information.
toeic.example_zh: 健全的內部控制可降低舞弊風險並確保公開財務資訊的可靠性。

toeic.example_en: The tone at the top significantly influences the overall control environment of any large organization.
toeic.example_zh: 高層的態度顯著影響任何大型組織的整體控制環境。

toeic.example_en: The auditors identified a material deficiency in our revenue recognition process and recommended corrective action.
toeic.example_zh: 稽核師發現我們的營收認列程序存在重大缺失，並建議採取改善行動。

toeic.example_en: Management committed to remediate all identified weaknesses before the next external audit cycle begins.
toeic.example_zh: 管理層承諾在下次外部稽核週期開始前修補所有已查出的缺失。

toeic.example_en: The remediation plan includes new training programs, updated procedures, and enhanced monitoring tools for transaction approvals.
toeic.example_zh: 補救計畫包含新訓練課程、更新的程序及加強的交易核准監控工具。

toeic.example_en: Moving into a higher tax bracket does not reduce total take-home pay because of marginal taxation principles.
toeic.example_zh: 由於邊際課稅原則，進入較高的稅級不會減少實得總薪資。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 應納稅額；稅務責任
toeic.example_en: Estimated quarterly payments help individuals manage their annual tax liability and avoid year-end underpayment penalties.
toeic.example_zh: 預估的季度繳稅有助個人管理年度應納稅額並避免年底繳稅不足罰款。

toeic.example_en: Electronic tax filing significantly reduces processing time and typically results in faster refunds for individual taxpayers.
toeic.example_zh: 電子報稅可大幅縮短處理時間，個人納稅人通常能更快收到退稅。

toeic.example_en: Interest earned on certain municipal bonds is tax-exempt at the federal level and sometimes at state levels.
toeic.example_zh: 某些市政債券所獲利息在聯邦層級免稅，有時州層級亦免稅。

toeic.example_en: Every taxpayer is responsible for keeping accurate records of income and deductions for at least seven years.
toeic.example_zh: 每位納稅人都有責任保留至少七年的所得與扣除額準確紀錄。

toeic.example_en: Annual audit fees increased significantly due to expanded testing requirements under the new accounting standards.
toeic.example_zh: 由於新會計準則下擴大了測試要求，年度審計費大幅增加。

toeic.example_en: We expanded the audit scope to include the recently acquired subsidiary's revenue and inventory accounts.
toeic.example_zh: 我們擴大審計範圍，將最近收購子公司的營收及存貨科目納入。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 委任書；業務約定書
toeic.example_en: The engagement letter clearly defines the audit objectives, fees, timeline, and responsibilities of both parties.
toeic.example_zh: 業務約定書明確界定審計目標、費用、時程及雙方責任。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 永續經營；繼續經營
toeic.example_en: The auditors expressed substantial doubt about the company's ability to continue as a going concern.
toeic.example_zh: 審計師對公司能否繼續永續經營表達了重大疑慮。

toeic.example_en: The financial statements must achieve fair presentation in accordance with the applicable reporting framework.
toeic.example_zh: 財務報表必須依適用的報導架構達到允當表達。

toeic.example_en: Listed companies must disclose all material events promptly to the regulator and the investing public.
toeic.example_zh: 上市公司必須及時向監管機關及投資大眾揭露所有重大事件。

toeic.example_en: New disclosure requirements compel companies to publish detailed climate-related financial risk information starting next fiscal year.
toeic.example_zh: 新揭露要求迫使公司自下個會計年度起公布詳細的氣候相關財務風險資訊。

toeic.example_en: A title search revealed an unrecorded encumbrance that needed to be resolved before the property sale could close.
toeic.example_zh: 產權搜尋發現一項未登記的產權負擔，必須在不動產買賣交割前解決。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 抵押人；房貸借款人
toeic.example_en: The mortgagor must maintain hazard insurance on the property throughout the entire term of the loan.
toeic.example_zh: 抵押人在整個貸款期間必須對該不動產投保損害險。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 抵押權人；放款銀行
toeic.example_en: If payments stop, the mortgagee may initiate foreclosure proceedings to recover the outstanding loan balance.
toeic.example_zh: 若停止繳款，抵押權人可啟動法拍程序以收回未償貸款餘額。

toeic.example_en: The applicant required a creditworthy endorser to qualify for the loan given her limited credit history.
toeic.example_zh: 由於申請人信用紀錄有限，需要一位信用良好的保證人才能獲得貸款資格。

toeic.example_en: Her father served as guarantor on the apartment lease because she was new to the city.
toeic.example_zh: 因為她剛搬到這座城市，父親擔任她公寓租約的擔保人。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 連帶簽署人；共同借款人
toeic.example_en: Adding a co-signer with strong credit can substantially improve the chances of loan approval for first-time borrowers.
toeic.example_zh: 為首次借款人加上信用良好的連帶簽署人可大幅提高貸款核准機率。

toeic.example_en: The term loan carries a fixed rate of six percent and matures in seven years with monthly payments.
toeic.example_zh: 該定期貸款固定利率為百分之六，七年到期，按月分期攤還。

toeic.example_en: The revolving credit facility lets the firm borrow and repay funds repeatedly up to an agreed credit limit.
toeic.example_zh: 循環信貸額度讓公司能在約定的信用額度內反覆借款與還款。

toeic.example_en: The company made its first drawdown of fifty million dollars from the credit facility to fund operations.
toeic.example_zh: 公司首次從信貸額度動用五千萬美元以支應營運。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 信貸額度；融資額度
toeic.example_en: The newly established credit facility provides flexible borrowing options to support seasonal working capital needs.
toeic.example_zh: 新設立的信貸額度提供靈活的借款選項，以支應季節性營運資金需求。

toeic.example_en: The principal protected note guarantees the return of the original investment at maturity regardless of market performance.
toeic.example_zh: 保本型商品保證在到期時退還原始投資本金，不受市場表現影響。

toeic.example_en: Many structured products promise yield enhancement in exchange for assuming additional downside risk on the underlying assets.
toeic.example_zh: 許多結構性商品承諾增強收益，但需承擔標的資產額外的下檔風險。

toeic.example_en: High-yield bonds offer higher coupons but carry significantly greater credit risk than investment-grade securities.
toeic.example_zh: 高收益債券提供較高票息，但信用風險顯著高於投資等級證券。

toeic.example_en: Semi-annual coupon payments provide bondholders with predictable income streams during the life of each bond.
toeic.example_zh: 半年期票息支付在每張債券存續期間為持有人提供可預期的收益流。

toeic.example_en: The bond was issued at par value of one thousand dollars and currently trades at a slight discount.
toeic.example_zh: 該債券以一千美元面值發行，目前以略低於面值的價格交易。

toeic.example_en: Investors purchase the discount bond below face value and receive the full par amount at maturity.
toeic.example_zh: 投資人以低於面值購買折價債券，並在到期時收回全額面值。

toeic.example_en: When market rates fall below the coupon rate, the bond trades as a premium bond above its face value.
toeic.example_zh: 當市場利率低於票息率時，該債券將以高於面值的溢價債券價格交易。

toeic.example_en: The narrowing yield spread between corporate and government bonds signaled improved confidence in the corporate sector.
toeic.example_zh: 公司債與政府公債利差收窄，顯示市場對企業部門信心改善。

toeic.example_en: Credit spread widening across the high-yield market often signals investor concerns about an impending economic slowdown.
toeic.example_zh: 高收益債市場信用利差擴大常顯示投資人擔憂經濟即將放緩。

toeic.example_en: The credit downgrade forced the company to refinance at much higher rates than originally anticipated.
toeic.example_zh: 信用降評迫使公司以遠高於最初預期的利率進行再融資。

toeic.example_en: A recent credit upgrade by all three major agencies reduced our borrowing costs across all debt instruments.
toeic.example_zh: 三家主要評等機構近期的信用升評降低了我們所有債務工具的借款成本。

toeic.example_en: Only a handful of corporations and sovereign issuers still hold AAA-rated status from all major rating agencies.
toeic.example_zh: 僅少數企業及主權發行人仍獲所有主要評等機構評為AAA級。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 投機等級；非投資等級
toeic.example_en: Bonds rated speculative grade are commonly referred to as high-yield or junk bonds in the market.
toeic.example_zh: 評等為投機等級的債券在市場上通常稱為高收益債或垃圾債券。

toeic.example_en: The agency revised the rating outlook from stable to negative following the disappointing quarterly earnings report.
toeic.example_zh: 在令人失望的季度盈餘報告後，評等機構將評等展望從穩定調整為負向。

toeic.example_en: The company was placed on the watch list pending the outcome of the proposed merger negotiations.
toeic.example_zh: 在擬議合併談判結果出爐前，該公司被列入觀察名單。

toeic.example_en: Writing a covered call generates premium income while limiting the upside potential on the underlying stock holding.
toeic.example_zh: 賣出掩護性買權能產生權利金收入，但會限制標的股票持有的上行潛力。

toeic.example_en: A protective put strategy sets a floor on potential losses by purchasing a put option on existing holdings.
toeic.example_zh: 保護性賣權策略透過為現有持股買入賣權，為潛在損失設定下限。

toeic.example_en: Options that finish out of the money at expiration become worthless, and the entire premium paid is lost.
toeic.example_zh: 在到期時處於價外的選擇權將失去價值，所支付的全部權利金都將損失。

toeic.example_en: A call option is in the money when the underlying stock trades above the strike price.
toeic.example_zh: 當標的股票價格高於履約價時，買權即處於價內。

toeic.example_en: An out of the money put option has no intrinsic value but retains some time value before expiration.
toeic.example_zh: 價外的賣權無內含價值，但在到期前仍保有部分時間價值。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 內含價值；真實價值
toeic.example_en: Value investors search for companies whose intrinsic value materially exceeds the current trading price.
toeic.example_zh: 價值投資者尋找其內含價值大幅高於目前交易價格的公司。

toeic.example_en: An option's time value erodes as it approaches expiration, accelerating most rapidly during the final weeks.
toeic.example_zh: 選擇權的時間價值隨到期日臨近而流失，並在最後幾週加速衰減。

toeic.example_en: Rising open interest combined with increasing prices typically confirms the strength of an uptrend.
toeic.example_zh: 未平倉量增加且價格上漲，通常確認上升趨勢的強度。

toeic.example_en: Equity trades typically have a settlement date two business days after the original transaction date.
toeic.example_zh: 股票交易通常在原交易日後兩個工作天為交割日。

toeic.example_en: The trade date is when the order executes, while settlement involves the actual exchange of cash and securities.
toeic.example_zh: 交易日是訂單執行的時間，而交割則涉及現金與證券的實際交換。

toeic.example_en: The clearinghouse acts as an intermediary that guarantees performance of every futures contract executed on the exchange.
toeic.example_zh: 清算所作為仲介機構，保證在交易所執行的每張期貨合約的履約。

toeic.example_en: The lender applied a thirty percent haircut to the collateral value when determining the maximum loan amount.
toeic.example_zh: 放款方在計算最高貸款金額時對擔保品價值套用百分之三十的折扣率。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 附買回交易；附買回協議
toeic.example_en: Overnight repo transactions provide essential short-term liquidity to dealers in the government bond market.
toeic.example_zh: 隔夜附買回交易為政府公債市場的交易商提供關鍵的短期流動性。

toeic.example_en: The central bank uses reverse repo operations to absorb excess liquidity from the banking system.
toeic.example_zh: 央行運用附賣回操作從銀行體系吸收過剩流動性。

toeic.example_en: Corporate treasurers park excess cash in money market funds for safety, liquidity, and modest short-term yields.
toeic.example_zh: 企業財務長將閒置資金存放於貨幣市場基金以兼顧安全性、流動性與適度的短期收益。

toeic.example_en: Large corporations issue commercial paper to meet short-term funding needs at rates below traditional bank loans.
toeic.example_zh: 大型企業發行商業本票以較傳統銀行貸款更低的利率滿足短期資金需求。

toeic.example_en: The three-month treasury bill is widely considered the closest approximation to a risk-free short-term investment.
toeic.example_zh: 三個月期國庫券普遍被視為最接近無風險的短期投資。

toeic.example_en: Treasury notes have maturities ranging from two to ten years and pay semi-annual coupon interest.
toeic.example_zh: 中期國債的到期期限介於兩年到十年之間，每半年支付一次票息。

toeic.example_en: Retirees often allocate a larger portion of their portfolios to fixed income for income stability and capital preservation.
toeic.example_zh: 退休人士常將投資組合中較大比例配置於固定收益，以追求收入穩定與資本保全。

toeic.example_en: Long-duration bond portfolios face significant duration risk when interest rates rise unexpectedly across the yield curve.
toeic.example_zh: 當利率沿著殖利率曲線意外上升時，長存續期間的債券投資組合面臨重大的存續期間風險。

toeic.example_en: Convexity measures the curvature of the price-yield relationship and complements duration as a bond risk measure.
toeic.example_zh: 凸性衡量價格與殖利率關係的曲率，補充存續期間作為債券風險衡量指標。

toeic.example_en: Banks use credit derivatives to transfer the credit risk of their loan portfolios to other market participants.
toeic.example_zh: 銀行利用信用衍生性商品將其貸款組合的信用風險轉移給其他市場參與者。

toeic.example_en: Structured products combine traditional securities with derivatives to create tailored risk-return profiles for specific investor objectives.
toeic.example_zh: 結構性商品結合傳統證券與衍生性商品，為特定投資目標打造客製化的風險報酬輪廓。

toeic.example_en: Asset-backed securities pool various consumer loans together and sell tranches with different credit characteristics to investors.
toeic.example_zh: 資產擔保證券將各種消費貸款匯集，並將具有不同信用特性的分券出售給投資人。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 不動產抵押貸款債券
toeic.example_en: Mortgage-backed bonds offer attractive yields but expose investors to prepayment risk during periods of falling interest rates.
toeic.example_zh: 不動產抵押貸款債券提供具吸引力的收益率，但在利率下降期間使投資人面臨提前還款風險。

toeic.example_en: Tranching creates different risk-return profiles by assigning losses sequentially to junior layers of the securitization structure.
toeic.example_zh: 分券化透過將損失依序分配給證券化結構中的次順位層，創造不同的風險報酬輪廓。

toeic.example_en: Securitization allows banks to convert illiquid loan portfolios into tradable securities and free up regulatory capital.
toeic.example_zh: 證券化讓銀行能將非流動的貸款組合轉換為可交易證券，並釋出監管資本。

toeic.example_en: The bank transferred the loan portfolio to a special purpose vehicle that issued bonds to outside investors.
toeic.example_zh: 銀行將貸款組合移轉給一家特殊目的機構，由其向外部投資人發行債券。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 表外的；資產負債表外的
toeic.example_en: Regulators tightened rules on off-balance-sheet exposures after lessons learned from the global financial crisis.
toeic.example_zh: 在記取全球金融危機教訓後，監管機關收緊了表外曝險的相關規定。

toeic.example_en: The lawsuit was disclosed as a contingent liability because the outcome and potential payout remain uncertain.
toeic.example_zh: 因結果與潛在賠付金額仍不確定，該訴訟以或有負債方式揭露。

toeic.example_en: The bank recorded a substantial loan loss provision in anticipation of higher defaults during the economic slowdown.
toeic.example_zh: 因應經濟放緩期間違約率可能上升，銀行提列了大額的呆帳準備。

toeic.example_en: Strengthening the loan loss reserve helps banks absorb potential credit losses without compromising regulatory capital ratios.
toeic.example_zh: 強化貸款損失準備金有助銀行吸收潛在信用損失而不影響法定資本比率。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 不良貸款；逾期放款
toeic.example_en: The ratio of non-performing loans rose to four percent of total assets following the regional economic downturn.
toeic.example_zh: 在區域經濟衰退後，不良貸款占總資產比率上升至百分之四。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 資產減記；價值調降
toeic.example_en: The company took a substantial write-down on inventory deemed obsolete after the recent product redesign.
toeic.example_zh: 因應近期產品改版，公司對被認定為過時的存貨進行了大幅減記。

toeic.example_en: Management approved a five million dollar writeoff for receivables deemed uncollectible after exhaustive collection efforts.
toeic.example_zh: 管理層核准了一筆五百萬美元的沖銷，沖掉經多番催收後仍被認定無法收回的應收款項。

toeic.example_en: The struggling bank received a capital injection from a sovereign wealth fund to restore its capital adequacy ratios.
toeic.example_zh: 陷入困境的銀行接受了主權財富基金的資本挹注以恢復其資本適足率。

toeic.example_en: The growing company raised one hundred million dollars through a private placement to accredited institutional investors.
toeic.example_zh: 這家成長中的公司透過向合格機構投資人私募籌得一億美元。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 後續增發；二次發行
toeic.example_en: The follow-on offering raised additional capital from existing shareholders without diluting their proportional ownership stake.
toeic.example_zh: 後續增發從現有股東募得額外資本，且未稀釋其比例持股。

toeic.example_en: Existing shareholders received preferential terms in the rights offering, preserving their ownership percentage in the firm.
toeic.example_zh: 現有股東在認股權發行中獲得優惠條件，得以維持其在公司的持股比例。

toeic.example_en: Issuing new shares at a discount to market price was considered dilutive to long-term shareholder value.
toeic.example_zh: 以低於市價折價發行新股被認為對長期股東價值具有稀釋性。

toeic.example_en: The proposed acquisition is expected to be accretive to earnings per share within the first full fiscal year.
toeic.example_zh: 擬議的併購預期可在完整會計年度內對每股盈餘產生增益效果。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 盈利能力支付（併購條款）
toeic.example_en: The earnout structure ties a portion of the purchase price to the target company's future financial performance.
toeic.example_zh: 盈利能力支付結構將部分收購價款與目標公司未來的財務表現掛鉤。

toeic.example_en: The acquirer paid for the target through a share swap rather than using cash from its corporate reserves.
toeic.example_zh: 收購方透過換股而非動用公司儲備現金來支付目標公司的對價。

toeic.example_en: Structuring the transaction as an asset purchase allowed the buyer to avoid assuming legacy legal liabilities.
toeic.example_zh: 將交易結構為資產收購讓買方能避免承擔既有的法律責任。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 股權收購；股票買入
toeic.example_en: The stock purchase agreement details the price per share, closing conditions, and post-closing indemnification obligations.
toeic.example_zh: 股權收購協議詳載每股價格、交割條件及交割後的賠償義務。

toeic.example_en: The carve-out transaction separated the underperforming division and prepared it for sale to a strategic buyer.
toeic.example_zh: 該分拆交易將表現不佳的部門切割出來，為出售給策略買家做準備。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 招攬期；接受其他要約期
toeic.example_en: During the go-shop period, the target's board may actively solicit superior offers from competing potential bidders.
toeic.example_zh: 在招攬期內，目標公司董事會可主動向其他潛在競標者徵求更優條件的報價。

toeic.example_en: The merger agreement includes a no-shop clause that prevents the target from seeking alternative offers during exclusivity.
toeic.example_zh: 合併協議納入禁止招攬條款，禁止目標公司在獨家期間尋求其他要約。

toeic.example_en: If the deal collapses for specified reasons, the seller must pay a substantial break-up fee to the buyer.
toeic.example_zh: 若交易因特定原因破局，賣方必須向買方支付高額的分手費。

toeic.example_en: Debt financing creates a valuable tax shield because interest expense reduces taxable income for the company.
toeic.example_zh: 債務融資創造可貴的稅盾，因為利息費用可降低公司的應稅所得。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 稅務虧損抵後扣除
toeic.example_en: The company can use its tax loss carryforward to offset taxable income generated in future profitable years.
toeic.example_zh: 公司可運用稅務虧損抵後扣除來抵減未來獲利年度產生的應稅所得。

toeic.example_en: Deferred income from prepaid annual subscriptions is recognized as revenue over the twelve-month service period.
toeic.example_zh: 預收的年度訂閱費所形成的遞延收入，將在十二個月服務期間內認列為營收。

toeic.example_en: Accrued income represents revenue earned but not yet invoiced or collected by the end of the reporting period.
toeic.example_zh: 應計收入代表在報導期間結束時已賺得但尚未開立發票或收款的收入。

toeic.example_en: Accrued liabilities include items such as unpaid wages, utilities, and interest that have been incurred but not yet paid.
toeic.example_zh: 應計負債包括已發生但尚未支付的薪資、水電費及利息等項目。

toeic.example_en: Trade receivables form a significant portion of working capital for businesses operating on standard payment terms.
toeic.example_zh: 對於以標準付款條件營運的企業而言，應收貿易帳款占營運資金的重要部分。

toeic.example_en: Stretching trade payables can temporarily improve cash flow but risks damaging important supplier relationships over time.
toeic.example_zh: 延長應付貿易帳款付款期可暫時改善現金流，但長期可能損害重要的供應商關係。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 應收帳款融資；發票融資
toeic.example_en: Invoice financing helps small businesses unlock cash tied up in outstanding receivables without taking on traditional bank debt.
toeic.example_zh: 發票融資協助小型企業釋出綁在未收應收款項中的現金，無需承擔傳統銀行債務。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 應收帳款承購業務；保理
toeic.example_en: Factoring allows companies to sell their receivables to a third party at a discount in exchange for immediate cash.
toeic.example_zh: 保理讓公司能將應收帳款以折扣價賣給第三方，以換取即時現金。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 保理公司；應收帳款承購公司
toeic.example_en: The factoring company assumes responsibility for collection and credit risk on the purchased customer invoices.
toeic.example_zh: 保理公司承擔所收購客戶發票的收款及信用風險責任。

toeic.example_en: Bill discounting provides immediate liquidity by selling future-dated commercial bills at a discount to face value.
toeic.example_zh: 票據貼現透過以低於面值的折扣賣出遠期商業票據來提供即時流動性。

toeic.example_en: Documentary credit reduces payment risk in international trade by ensuring banks verify documents before releasing funds.
toeic.example_zh: 跟單信用狀透過要求銀行在放款前審核文件，降低國際貿易中的付款風險。

toeic.example_en: A standby letter of credit serves as a backup payment guarantee if the primary obligor fails to pay.
toeic.example_zh: 備用信用狀作為主要債務人未能付款時的備援付款保證。

toeic.example_en: The exporter drew a bill of exchange on the buyer for the full value of the shipment.
toeic.example_zh: 出口商按該批貨物全額對買方開出匯票。

toeic.example_en: Documentary collection offers a cheaper alternative to letters of credit but provides less protection to the seller.
toeic.example_zh: 跟單託收提供比信用狀更便宜的替代方案，但對賣方保障較少。

toeic.example_en: The incoterm chosen in the contract determines exactly when risk and responsibility transfer from seller to buyer.
toeic.example_zh: 合約中所選擇的國際貿易條件決定風險與責任由賣方轉移至買方的確切時點。

toeic.example_en: Under free carrier terms, the seller fulfills its obligation when goods are handed to the buyer's nominated carrier.
toeic.example_zh: 在貨交承運人條件下，賣方將貨物交給買方指定承運人時即履行義務。

toeic.example_en: Delivered duty paid terms require the seller to handle all duties, taxes, and delivery costs to the buyer's location.
toeic.example_zh: 完稅交貨條件要求賣方負責所有關稅、稅費及運至買方地點的成本。

toeic.example_en: Under delivered at place terms, the seller bears all risks and costs until goods arrive at the named destination.
toeic.example_zh: 在目的地交貨條件下，賣方承擔貨物抵達指定目的地前的所有風險與成本。

toeic.example_en: With ex works pricing, the buyer arranges all transport and assumes all costs from the seller's premises onward.
toeic.example_zh: 採用工廠交貨報價時，買方安排所有運輸並承擔從賣方場所之後的所有成本。

toeic.example_en: Free alongside ship terms place responsibility on the seller until the goods are delivered next to the vessel.
toeic.example_zh: 船邊交貨條件下賣方須負責至貨物送達船邊。

toeic.example_en: Carriage paid to terms require the seller to pay freight to the named destination but transfer risk earlier.
toeic.example_zh: 運費付訖條件要求賣方支付至指定目的地的運費，但風險較早轉移。

toeic.example_en: Reducing trade barriers between the two countries opened significant new export opportunities for domestic manufacturers.
toeic.example_zh: 兩國間貿易壁壘的減少為國內製造商開啟了重要的新出口機會。

toeic.example_en: Rising protectionism has prompted multinationals to diversify their supply chains across multiple regions to reduce risk.
toeic.example_zh: 保護主義抬頭促使跨國企業將供應鏈分散至多個區域以降低風險。

toeic.example_en: A currency swap allows two parties to exchange interest payments and principal in different currencies for a set period.
toeic.example_zh: 貨幣互換讓兩方在約定期間內交換以不同貨幣計價的利息支付及本金。

toeic.example_en: Hedgers use the futures market to lock in prices and protect against adverse commodity price movements.
toeic.example_zh: 避險者運用期貨市場鎖定價格，以防範商品價格的不利波動。

toeic.example_en: Major commodity exchanges set the global benchmark prices for crude oil, gold, and agricultural products.
toeic.example_zh: 主要商品交易所為原油、黃金及農產品設定全球基準價格。

toeic.example_en: The spot transaction settled two business days after execution at the prevailing foreign exchange market rate.
toeic.example_zh: 該即期交易於成交後兩個工作天，以當時外匯市場匯率交割。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 利息累計；應計利息
toeic.example_en: Interest accrual begins on the day funds are disbursed and continues until the loan is fully repaid.
toeic.example_zh: 利息累計自撥款當日起算，並持續至貸款全額償還為止。

toeic.example_en: Shorter compounding periods result in higher effective yields than annual compounding at the same nominal rate.
toeic.example_zh: 在相同名目利率下，較短的複利計算期會產生比年複利更高的有效收益率。

toeic.example_en: The effective annual rate accounts for compounding frequency and provides a true comparison across different loan products.
toeic.example_zh: 有效年利率考量複利頻率，能對不同貸款產品提供真正可比較的基準。

toeic.example_en: The nominal interest rate ignores inflation, while the real interest rate adjusts for purchasing power changes.
toeic.example_zh: 名目利率忽略通膨，而實質利率則調整購買力的變化。

toeic.example_en: Investors care about the real interest rate because it reflects actual purchasing power gained on savings.
toeic.example_zh: 投資人在意實質利率，因為它反映儲蓄實際獲得的購買力增長。

toeic.example_en: Many investors regard real estate, gold, and inflation-linked bonds as effective inflation hedges over long horizons.
toeic.example_zh: 許多投資人將不動產、黃金及通膨連結債券視為長期有效的通膨避險工具。

toeic.example_en: Principal on inflation-linked bonds adjusts upward with consumer price index changes, preserving real purchasing power for investors.
toeic.example_zh: 通膨連結債券的本金會隨消費者物價指數變動而上調，為投資人保全實質購買力。

toeic.example_en: The central bank cut its policy rate by twenty-five basis points to support economic growth amid weakening demand.
toeic.example_zh: 央行降息一碼以在需求疲弱之際支持經濟成長。

toeic.example_en: The aggressive rate hike cycle was designed to cool inflation but also slowed economic activity considerably.
toeic.example_zh: 積極的升息循環旨在抑制通膨，但也大幅放緩了經濟活動。

toeic.example_en: Markets rallied sharply after the central bank announced a surprise rate cut at its emergency policy meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 在央行於緊急政策會議上意外宣布降息後，市場大幅上漲。

toeic.example_en: Open market operations are the primary tool central banks use to influence short-term interest rates and bank reserves.
toeic.example_zh: 公開市場操作是央行用以影響短期利率及銀行準備金的主要工具。

toeic.example_en: Monetary tightening typically slows credit growth, cools asset prices, and reduces inflationary pressures over time.
toeic.example_zh: 貨幣緊縮通常會放緩信貸成長、降溫資產價格，並隨時間降低通膨壓力。

toeic.example_en: Monetary easing measures included lower interest rates and large-scale purchases of government and corporate securities.
toeic.example_zh: 貨幣寬鬆措施包含調降利率及大規模購入政府與公司債券。

toeic.example_en: Central bank intervention in the currency market stabilized the local currency after weeks of speculative attacks.
toeic.example_zh: 央行在匯市的干預在數週投機攻擊後穩定了本國貨幣。

toeic.example_en: Currency intervention can temporarily influence exchange rates but rarely changes long-term fundamental trends.
toeic.example_zh: 匯率干預可暫時影響匯率，但鮮少改變長期基本面趨勢。

toeic.example_en: Sterilization operations offset the liquidity impact of currency intervention on the domestic money supply.
toeic.example_zh: 沖銷操作抵銷匯率干預對國內貨幣供給的流動性影響。

toeic.example_en: A currency board fixes the local currency to a foreign anchor and requires full reserve backing for issuance.
toeic.example_zh: 貨幣局將本國貨幣固定釘住某外幣作為錨，並要求發行貨幣需有十足準備支持。

toeic.example_en: Under a floating exchange rate regime, market forces determine the currency's value relative to other currencies.
toeic.example_zh: 在浮動匯率制度下，市場力量決定本國貨幣相對於其他貨幣的價值。

toeic.example_en: Some emerging economies maintain a fixed exchange rate to provide stability for international trade and investment.
toeic.example_zh: 部分新興經濟體維持固定匯率，為國際貿易與投資提供穩定性。

toeic.example_en: The trade-weighted index measures a currency's value against a basket of major trading partner currencies.
toeic.example_zh: 貿易加權指數衡量一國貨幣對主要貿易夥伴貨幣組合的價值。
