toeic.example_en: Frontline agents follow specific call escalation procedures when customers request supervisors or when issues exceed their resolution authority limits.
toeic.example_zh: 當客戶要求主管或問題超出其解決權限時，第一線專員會遵循特定的來電升級程序。

toeic.example_en: Reducing the abandonment rate from twelve percent to five percent significantly improved overall customer experience scores in our service center.
toeic.example_zh: 將棄話率從百分之十二降至百分之五，大幅提升了我們服務中心的整體客戶體驗分數。

toeic.example_en: Strategic staffing during peak hours led to dramatic wait time reduction and noticeably better customer feedback across multiple satisfaction surveys.
toeic.example_zh: 尖峰時段的策略性人力配置顯著縮減了等候時間，並在多項滿意度調查中獲得明顯更好的客戶回饋。

toeic.example_en: We apologize for any service interruption customers experienced yesterday during the scheduled emergency maintenance window across the entire network.
toeic.example_zh: 對於昨日在排定的緊急維護時段內客戶遇到的任何服務中斷，我們深表歉意。

toeic.example_en: Customers received email notifications two weeks before the planned outage so they could schedule alternative arrangements for critical workflows.
toeic.example_zh: 客戶在計畫性停機前兩週收到電子郵件通知，以便為關鍵工作流程安排替代方案。

toeic.example_en: Engineering teams conduct a blameless post-incident review after every major outage to identify systemic issues and prevent recurrence.
toeic.example_zh: 工程團隊在每次重大事件後進行無責備的事件後檢討，找出系統性問題並防止再次發生。

toeic.example_en: Our blameless culture encourages engineers to report mistakes openly so the entire organization can learn and continuously improve our systems.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的無責備文化鼓勵工程師公開回報錯誤，讓整個組織得以學習並持續改善我們的系統。

toeic.example_en: The after-action report identified communication gaps between departments and proposed concrete process changes to prevent similar problems going forward.
toeic.example_zh: 事後檢討報告指出了各部門間的溝通落差，並提出具體的流程變更建議，以防止未來類似問題發生。

toeic.example_en: Establishing a tight user feedback loop helps product teams iterate quickly and ship features that truly solve customer problems.
toeic.example_zh: 建立緊密的使用者回饋循環有助於產品團隊快速迭代並推出真正解決客戶問題的功能。

toeic.example_en: Rapid prototyping allowed our design team to test five different interface concepts with real users in just two weeks.
toeic.example_zh: 快速原型製作讓我們的設計團隊能在僅兩週內以真實使用者測試五種不同的介面概念。

toeic.example_en: Rather than shipping a barely functional MVP, the team aims for a minimum lovable product that genuinely delights early users.
toeic.example_zh: 團隊不再推出勉強可用的最小可行產品，而是追求真正令早期使用者感到喜愛的最小可愛產品。

toeic.example_en: Achieving product-market fit means customers actively seek out your product and recommend it enthusiastically without prompting from sales teams.
toeic.example_zh: 達成產品市場契合度意味著客戶主動尋找您的產品，並在無業務團隊促使下熱情推薦。

toeic.example_en: The product-led go-to-market motion has proven more efficient than traditional outbound sales for our self-service collaboration software offering.
toeic.example_zh: 對我們的自助式協作軟體而言，產品主導的進入市場模式已證明比傳統的外撥銷售更為有效。

toeic.example_en: Product-led growth strategies allow users to experience full product value through free trials before our sales team makes contact.
toeic.example_zh: 產品主導成長策略讓使用者透過免費試用體驗產品的完整價值，之後我們的業務團隊才會接觸。

toeic.example_en: Our freemium tier attracts millions of casual users, a small percentage of whom eventually upgrade to paid premium business plans.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的免費增值方案吸引了數百萬輕度使用者，其中一小部分最終會升級為付費的高級商業方案。

toeic.example_en: Subscribers on the premium tier gain access to advanced analytics, priority support and a dedicated account manager for guidance.
toeic.example_zh: 高級方案訂閱者可使用進階分析功能、優先支援，並享有專屬客戶經理的指導。

toeic.example_en: The enterprise tier includes custom contract terms, dedicated infrastructure and around-the-clock technical support from senior engineering specialists.
toeic.example_zh: 企業方案包含客製化合約條款、專屬基礎架構及全天候由資深工程專員提供的技術支援。

toeic.example_en: We restructured our pricing tiers based on customer usage patterns identified through extensive market research and detailed customer interviews.
toeic.example_zh: 我們依據透過廣泛市場研究與詳細客戶訪談所發現的客戶使用模式，重新調整了定價層級。

toeic.example_en: Usage-based pricing appeals to startups because they only pay for what they actually consume rather than fixed monthly subscription fees.
toeic.example_zh: 用量計費對新創公司具吸引力，因為他們只需為實際使用量付費，而非固定的月度訂閱費。

toeic.example_en: Seat-based pricing provides predictable monthly costs but can become expensive as customer organizations rapidly expand their internal user base.
toeic.example_zh: 席次計費提供可預測的月度成本，但隨著客戶組織快速擴展內部使用者基數，成本可能變得昂貴。

toeic.example_en: Flat-rate pricing simplifies budgeting decisions for procurement teams who prefer predictable annual costs over variable consumption-based billing models.
toeic.example_zh: 固定費率簡化了採購團隊的預算決策，他們偏好可預測的年度成本，而非依用量計費的可變模式。

toeic.example_en: The customer requested aligning their billing cycle with their fiscal year for simplified internal accounting and easier expense reconciliation.
toeic.example_zh: 客戶要求將其計費週期與其財年對齊，以簡化內部會計作業並更便於費用對帳。

toeic.example_en: When customers upgrade mid-cycle, we apply a prorated charge for the remaining days in the current monthly billing period.
toeic.example_zh: 當客戶在計費週期中升級時，我們會就當月計費期間剩餘天數按比例計算費用。

toeic.example_en: Customers can disable auto-renewal in their account settings at least thirty days before their current subscription term expires.
toeic.example_zh: 客戶可在其目前訂閱期到期前至少三十天，於帳號設定中關閉自動續訂。

toeic.example_en: A subscription tier upgrade unlocks additional features immediately while the price difference is prorated across the remaining contract period.
toeic.example_zh: 訂閱方案升級可立即解鎖額外功能，價差則按剩餘合約期間按比例計算。

toeic.example_en: Customers retain a downgrade option at any time, though they will lose access to premium features at the next billing period.
toeic.example_zh: 客戶可隨時選擇降級，但將在下個計費期失去高級功能的存取權限。

toeic.example_en: Enter the promo code at checkout to receive twenty percent off your first three months of the premium subscription plan.
toeic.example_zh: 結帳時輸入優惠碼，即可享高級訂閱方案前三個月八折優惠。

toeic.example_en: Our referral bonus program rewards both the existing customer and the new signup with credits applied to their respective accounts.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的推薦獎金方案會獎勵現有客戶與新註冊用戶，將點數記入其各自的帳號。

toeic.example_en: Joining the affiliate program lets content creators earn commissions by promoting our products to their audiences through unique tracking links.
toeic.example_zh: 加入聯盟行銷方案讓內容創作者透過獨特追蹤連結向其受眾推廣我們的產品來賺取佣金。

toeic.example_en: Sales representatives reaching the top commission tier earn double their base commission rate on all closed-won deals each quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 達到最高佣金級距的業務代表，每季所有成交贏單可獲得基本佣金率的雙倍報酬。

toeic.example_en: The implementation kickoff workshop brings together stakeholders from both organizations to align on project scope, timelines and shared success criteria.
toeic.example_zh: 導入啟動工作坊將兩個組織的利害關係人聚集起來，就專案範圍、時程及共同成功標準達成一致。

toeic.example_en: We facilitate a discovery workshop early in the engagement to uncover the client's true business objectives behind the stated requirements.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在合作早期舉辦探索工作坊，挖掘客戶在表面需求背後的真實業務目標。

toeic.example_en: Quarterly checkpoint reviews ensure the partnership delivers expected value and provide an opportunity to recalibrate priorities as needed.
toeic.example_zh: 每季的階段檢視會議確保合作關係達成預期價值，並提供視需要重新校準優先順序的機會。

toeic.example_en: The team completed a thorough go-live readiness assessment covering training, infrastructure capacity and the rollback procedures for any potential issues.
toeic.example_zh: 團隊完成了徹底的上線就緒度評估，涵蓋培訓、基礎架構容量及任何潛在問題的回滾程序。

toeic.example_en: The detailed cutover plan specified every step required to transition customers from the legacy system to the new platform.
toeic.example_zh: 詳細的系統切換計畫明訂了將客戶從舊系統轉移到新平台所需的每個步驟。

toeic.example_en: The data migration project successfully transferred fifteen years of historical customer records into the new cloud-based platform without significant errors.
toeic.example_zh: 資料移轉專案成功將十五年的歷史客戶記錄轉移到新的雲端平台，幾乎沒有錯誤。

toeic.example_en: Maintaining the legacy system has become increasingly expensive, prompting management to finally approve the long-postponed full modernization project.
toeic.example_zh: 維護舊系統變得越來越昂貴，促使管理層終於核准長期延後的全面現代化專案。

toeic.example_en: Successful system integration between our CRM and accounting software eliminated hours of duplicate data entry by sales operations every week.
toeic.example_zh: 我們客戶關係管理系統與會計軟體成功整合後，每週為業務營運省下數小時的重複資料輸入作業。

toeic.example_en: The API gateway centralizes authentication, rate limiting and monitoring for every external request hitting our hundreds of backend microservices.
toeic.example_zh: API 閘道集中處理身分驗證、速率限制與監控，涵蓋所有抵達我們數百個後端微服務的外部請求。

toeic.example_en: Rate limiting protects our service from being overwhelmed by automated scripts while ensuring legitimate users always receive prompt response times.
toeic.example_zh: 速率限制保護我們的服務免於被自動化腳本壓垮，同時確保合法使用者始終獲得快速的回應時間。

toeic.example_en: Webhook integration sends real-time event notifications from our platform to external systems whenever specific customer actions are completed.
toeic.example_zh: Webhook 整合在特定客戶動作完成時，將即時事件通知從我們的平台發送至外部系統。

toeic.example_en: Comprehensive SDK documentation with working code examples reduces the learning curve for developers integrating our payment processing platform.
toeic.example_zh: 包含可執行程式範例的完整 SDK 文件，能降低開發者整合我們支付處理平台的學習曲線。

toeic.example_en: Our developer portal centralizes API references, code samples and community discussions to help technical partners build integrations more quickly.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的開發者入口網站集中提供 API 參考文件、程式碼範例與社群討論，協助技術合作夥伴更快地建立整合。

toeic.example_en: Developers test new integrations in a sandbox environment using simulated data before deploying their code to production customer accounts.
toeic.example_zh: 開發者在沙盒環境中使用模擬資料測試新整合，之後才將程式碼部署到正式生產的客戶帳號。

toeic.example_en: Quality assurance teams thoroughly validate every release in the staging environment that closely mirrors our production system configurations.
toeic.example_zh: 品保團隊在密切模擬我們生產系統配置的預備環境中徹底驗證每個發布版本。

toeic.example_en: The team scheduled the production deployment for two AM Sunday to minimize disruption to active users in major time zones.
toeic.example_zh: 團隊將正式部署排定在週日凌晨兩點，以盡量減少對主要時區活躍使用者的影響。

toeic.example_en: Every deployment includes a tested rollback procedure that can revert the system to its previous stable state within fifteen minutes.
toeic.example_zh: 每次部署都包含經過測試的回滾程序，可在十五分鐘內將系統還原到先前的穩定狀態。

toeic.example_en: Engineers run an automated smoke test immediately after every deployment to verify the core application functionality remains operational and stable.
toeic.example_zh: 工程師在每次部署後立即執行自動化冒煙測試，確認核心應用功能維持運作且穩定。

toeic.example_en: Our nightly regression test suite covers thousands of scenarios to catch any unintended side effects from recent application code changes.
toeic.example_zh: 我們每晚的迴歸測試套件涵蓋數千種情境，以捕捉最近應用程式程式碼變更可能產生的任何非預期副作用。

toeic.example_en: Investment in test automation has reduced our manual quality assurance effort by seventy percent while significantly improving overall release quality consistency.
toeic.example_zh: 投資測試自動化使我們的人工品保工作量減少了百分之七十，同時大幅改善整體發布品質的一致性。

toeic.example_en: Engineering management requires every new feature to maintain at least eighty percent test coverage before code can be merged.
toeic.example_zh: 工程管理層要求每項新功能在程式碼合併前必須維持至少百分之八十的測試覆蓋率。

toeic.example_en: Clear user acceptance criteria defined at the start of the sprint help engineers know exactly when a story is complete.
toeic.example_zh: 在衝刺開始時明確訂定使用者驗收標準，可幫助工程師確切知道何時故事已完成。

toeic.example_en: The product backlog contains hundreds of prioritized items representing future features, technical improvements and bug fixes awaiting team capacity.
toeic.example_zh: 產品待辦清單包含數百項已排定優先順序的項目，代表未來功能、技術改進及待團隊產能處理的錯誤修復。

toeic.example_en: Quarterly release planning aligns engineering capacity with the most strategically important product initiatives identified by the executive leadership team.
toeic.example_zh: 季度發布規劃將工程產能與高階領導團隊認定的策略最重要產品計畫對齊。

toeic.example_en: Hitting the next roadmap milestone requires successful integration of the acquired company's technology into our platform by end of quarter.
toeic.example_zh: 達成下一個路線圖里程碑需要在季底前成功將收購公司的技術整合進我們的平台。

toeic.example_en: Analyzing the conversion funnel revealed that fifty percent of prospects dropped off at the pricing comparison page step.
toeic.example_zh: 分析轉換漏斗顯示有百分之五十的潛在客戶在定價比較頁面的步驟流失。

toeic.example_en: Reducing checkout drop-off rate by just three percentage points would generate substantial additional revenue annually from existing visitor traffic.
toeic.example_zh: 結帳流失率僅降低三個百分點，每年就能從現有訪客流量產生可觀的額外營收。

toeic.example_en: Average session duration on our help center pages increased significantly after we redesigned the navigation and added improved internal search functionality.
toeic.example_zh: 在我們重新設計導覽並新增改進的內部搜尋功能後，協助中心頁面的平均工作階段時長大幅增加。

toeic.example_en: Total page views jumped twenty percent during the product launch week as press coverage drove substantial new traffic to our public website.
toeic.example_zh: 產品發布週的總頁面瀏覽量增加了百分之二十，因為媒體報導為我們的公開網站帶來了大量新流量。

toeic.example_en: We attracted three million unique visitors to our holiday campaign landing page during the first two weeks of promotion.
toeic.example_zh: 在促銷的前兩週，我們的假期活動登陸頁面吸引了三百萬名不重複訪客。

toeic.example_en: Referral traffic from industry publications now drives nearly thirty percent of qualified inbound leads to our enterprise software business.
toeic.example_zh: 來自產業出版品的推薦流量現在為我們的企業軟體業務帶來近百分之三十的合格進線潛在客戶。

toeic.example_en: Investing in high-quality content marketing has tripled our organic search traffic over the past eighteen months without paid advertising spend.
toeic.example_zh: 投資高品質的內容行銷使我們的自然搜尋流量在過去十八個月內成長三倍，且未動用付費廣告預算。

toeic.example_en: Paid search remains our most reliable channel for generating immediate qualified leads when we need to fill the sales pipeline.
toeic.example_zh: 當我們需要填補銷售管線時，付費搜尋仍是我們產生立即合格潛在客戶最可靠的管道。

toeic.example_en: Display advertising on industry websites builds brand awareness even when prospects do not immediately click through to our website.
toeic.example_zh: 在產業網站上投放展示型廣告即便潛在客戶未立即點擊進入我們的網站，仍能建立品牌知名度。

toeic.example_en: Our retargeting campaign re-engages website visitors who abandoned the signup flow before completing their initial free trial registration.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的再行銷活動重新吸引在完成初始免費試用註冊前放棄註冊流程的網站訪客。

toeic.example_en: Programmatic advertising platforms automatically purchase display inventory across thousands of websites based on real-time targeting criteria and audience data.
toeic.example_zh: 程式化廣告平台依據即時目標設定條件與受眾資料，自動在數千個網站購買展示廣告版位。

toeic.example_en: The CFO requested a detailed breakdown of digital ad spend by channel before approving next year's expanded marketing budget allocation.
toeic.example_zh: 財務長要求提供按管道區分的數位廣告支出詳細明細，才會核准明年擴大的行銷預算配置。

toeic.example_en: Our return on ad spend improved dramatically after switching to a new attribution model that better credits assisting marketing channels.
toeic.example_zh: 我們改用更能歸功於輔助行銷管道的新歸因模型後，廣告投資報酬率大幅改善。

toeic.example_en: Reducing cost per acquisition while maintaining lead quality requires sophisticated targeting and continuously refreshing creative content for digital channels.
toeic.example_zh: 在維持潛在客戶品質的同時降低每次獲客成本，需要精細的目標設定與持續更新數位管道的創意內容。

toeic.example_en: Average cost per click for our top industry keywords has risen significantly as more competitors aggressively enter the paid search auction.
toeic.example_zh: 隨著更多競爭者積極進入付費搜尋拍賣，我們主要產業關鍵字的平均每次點擊成本已大幅上升。

toeic.example_en: Cost per impression provides a useful comparison metric when evaluating awareness-focused campaigns running across multiple digital advertising channels and platforms.
toeic.example_zh: 當評估在多個數位廣告管道與平台上運行的品牌認知活動時，每千次曝光成本提供有用的比較指標。

toeic.example_en: Improving viewability rate ensures that our display advertising budget actually reaches users instead of being wasted on hidden ad slots.
toeic.example_zh: 提升可視率可確保我們的展示廣告預算確實觸及使用者，而不是浪費在隱藏的廣告版位上。

toeic.example_en: Premium ad placement near the top of high-traffic news sites typically commands significantly higher rates than standard banner positions below.
toeic.example_zh: 高流量新聞網站頂部附近的高級廣告版位通常較下方標準橫幅位置收取明顯更高的費率。

toeic.meaning_zh: (片語) 螢幕首屏；頁面頂部可見區
toeic.example_en: Placing the key value proposition above the fold significantly improves conversion rates by capturing visitor attention immediately upon page arrival.
toeic.example_zh: 將關鍵價值主張置於螢幕首屏可大幅提升轉換率，能在訪客抵達頁面後立即吸引其注意。

toeic.example_en: Every landing page needs a clear, compelling call to action that tells visitors exactly what step they should take next.
toeic.example_zh: 每個登陸頁面都需要清楚有力的行動呼籲，明確告訴訪客下一步應採取什麼動作。

toeic.example_en: Including personalized subject lines dramatically increased email click-through to our promotional landing pages during the holiday marketing campaign.
toeic.example_zh: 加入個人化的主旨使假期行銷活動期間電子郵件點擊進入我們促銷登陸頁面的次數大幅增加。

toeic.example_en: Our average email open rate climbed above thirty percent after we implemented improved subject line testing and segmentation strategies.
toeic.example_zh: 在實施改進的主旨測試與分眾策略後，我們的平均電子郵件開信率攀升至百分之三十以上。

toeic.example_en: Maintaining high email deliverability rate requires careful list hygiene and proper authentication configuration to avoid spam filter rejection.
toeic.example_zh: 維持高電子郵件送達率需要謹慎的清單維護與正確的驗證設定，才能避免被垃圾郵件過濾器拒絕。

toeic.example_en: Critical service notifications occasionally land in customers' spam folders, prompting our team to add backup notification channels for redundancy.
toeic.example_zh: 關鍵服務通知偶爾會落入客戶的垃圾郵件夾，促使我們團隊新增備援通知管道作為冗餘機制。

toeic.example_en: Maintaining strong sender reputation requires consistent volume, low complaint rates and engaged subscribers actively opening your marketing messages.
toeic.example_zh: 維持良好的寄件者信譽需要穩定的發送量、低投訴率，以及積極開啟您行銷訊息的活躍訂閱者。

toeic.example_en: Sophisticated list segmentation allows us to send highly relevant content to each subscriber based on past behavior and demographic profile details.
toeic.example_zh: 精細的名單分眾讓我們可根據過去行為與人口統計輪廓細節，向每位訂閱者發送高度相關的內容。

toeic.example_en: A well-designed drip campaign nurtures leads with educational content over several weeks before they receive any direct sales messaging.
toeic.example_zh: 設計良好的滴灌式行銷活動以教育性內容培育潛在客戶數週後，才會收到任何直接的銷售訊息。

toeic.example_en: Marketing automation tools trigger personalized emails based on visitor behavior, freeing the team to focus on higher value strategic work.
toeic.example_zh: 行銷自動化工具根據訪客行為觸發個人化郵件，讓團隊能專注於更高價值的策略性工作。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 潛在客戶評分模型
toeic.example_en: Our lead scoring model assigns points based on demographic fit and engagement signals to identify the most sales-ready prospects.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的潛在客戶評分模型根據人口統計契合度與互動訊號分配點數，找出最具銷售準備度的潛在客戶。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 銷售合格潛在客戶
toeic.example_en: Once a lead crosses the scoring threshold, it becomes a sales-qualified lead and is automatically assigned to an account executive.
toeic.example_zh: 一旦潛在客戶跨越評分門檻，便成為銷售合格潛在客戶，並自動指派給客戶執行。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 行銷合格潛在客戶
toeic.example_en: A marketing-qualified lead has shown enough interest to warrant follow-up but typically requires further nurturing before being passed to sales.
toeic.example_zh: 行銷合格潛在客戶展現了足夠的興趣值得後續追蹤，但通常需要進一步培育後才能交給業務團隊。

toeic.example_en: Each stage of the demand funnel has specific conversion goals and unique messaging tailored to prospects' progressively deepening understanding of our solution.
toeic.example_zh: 需求漏斗的每個階段都有特定的轉換目標，並針對潛在客戶對我們方案逐步加深的理解量身打造獨特訊息。

toeic.example_en: Third-party intent data reveals which target accounts are actively researching solutions like ours even before they visit our website.
toeic.example_zh: 第三方意圖資料能在目標客戶尚未造訪我們網站前，便揭示哪些客戶正積極研究類似我們的解決方案。

toeic.example_en: Firmographic data includes company size, industry, revenue and location, helping marketers identify ideal target accounts for outreach campaigns.
toeic.example_zh: 企業統計資料包括公司規模、產業、營收與地點，協助行銷人員識別外撥活動的理想目標客戶。

toeic.example_en: Technographic data shows which software platforms target accounts already use, revealing potential integration opportunities or competitive replacement scenarios.
toeic.example_zh: 技術應用資料顯示目標客戶已使用哪些軟體平台，揭示潛在的整合機會或競爭替代情境。

toeic.example_en: The sales team developed a competitive displacement playbook to win deals from customers currently using our largest direct competitor's product.
toeic.example_zh: 業務團隊製作了競爭替代戰術手冊，以贏取目前使用我們最大直接競爭對手產品的客戶。

toeic.example_en: Quarterly win-loss interviews with recent prospects reveal patterns in why deals close successfully or are lost to competitors permanently.
toeic.example_zh: 與近期潛在客戶進行每季輸贏訪談，可揭示交易為何成功成交或永久輸給競爭對手的模式。

toeic.example_en: Enterprise procurement teams typically build a vendor evaluation matrix scoring each candidate against weighted criteria before making a final selection decision.
toeic.example_zh: 企業採購團隊通常會建立廠商評估矩陣，依加權標準為每位候選人評分，再做出最終選擇決定。

toeic.example_en: We made the shortlist of three candidate vendors after submitting an impressive response to the client's initial request for proposal.
toeic.example_zh: 我們在向客戶最初的提案邀請書提交令人印象深刻的回應後，進入了三家候選廠商的入圍名單。

toeic.example_en: Strong executive sponsorship within the prospect organization typically correlates with faster deal velocity and significantly higher close rates overall.
toeic.example_zh: 潛在客戶組織內強而有力的高階主管贊助通常與更快的交易速度及整體顯著更高的成交率呈正相關。

toeic.example_en: Identifying a strong champion within the account is essential for navigating complex enterprise procurement processes and overcoming internal political resistance.
toeic.example_zh: 找出客戶內部強力的擁護者，對於應對複雜的企業採購流程與克服內部政治阻力至關重要。

toeic.example_en: Enterprise deals often involve a procurement cycle of six to nine months due to extensive security reviews and legal negotiations.
toeic.example_zh: 企業交易通常因廣泛的資安審查與法律談判而需要六至九個月的採購週期。

toeic.example_en: Shortening the deal cycle from one hundred twenty to ninety days improves cash flow and increases the team's annual quota attainment.
toeic.example_zh: 將交易週期從一百二十天縮短至九十天可改善現金流，並提升團隊的年度配額達成率。

toeic.example_en: Each closed-won opportunity triggers an automated handoff process that connects the customer with their assigned onboarding specialist within twenty-four hours.
toeic.example_zh: 每筆成交贏單會觸發自動化交接流程，在二十四小時內將客戶與其指派的導入專員連結起來。

toeic.example_en: Documenting reasons for every closed-lost opportunity helps the team identify patterns and improve our overall competitive positioning over time.
toeic.example_zh: 記錄每筆失單機會的原因有助於團隊發現規律，並隨時間改善我們整體的競爭定位。

toeic.example_en: A no-decision deal occurs when prospects decide to maintain their current state rather than choosing any vendor including competitors entirely.
toeic.example_zh: 當潛在客戶決定維持現狀而不選擇任何廠商（包括競爭對手）時，便會出現未做決策的交易。

toeic.example_en: Weekly deal review meetings allow sales leadership to coach reps on key opportunities and identify deals requiring executive intervention.
toeic.example_zh: 每週的交易審查會議讓業務領導層能就關鍵機會輔導業務代表，並找出需要高階主管介入的交易。

toeic.example_en: Monthly pipeline review ensures realistic forecasting and helps managers redistribute opportunities when individual reps face capacity constraints or other challenges.
toeic.example_zh: 每月的銷售管線檢視能確保預測切合實際，並協助主管在個別業務代表面臨產能限制或其他挑戰時重新分配機會。

toeic.example_en: Each account executive develops a detailed territory plan identifying top target accounts and the specific strategies for engaging each one.
toeic.example_zh: 每位客戶執行都會制定詳細的銷售區域計畫，找出最重要的目標客戶以及與每位客戶接觸的具體策略。

toeic.example_en: A thorough account plan maps key stakeholders, current technology investments and the strategic business initiatives driving the prospect's purchasing decisions.
toeic.example_zh: 完善的客戶經營計畫繪製出關鍵利害關係人、現有技術投資及驅動潛在客戶採購決策的策略性業務計畫。

toeic.example_en: Developing a mutual close plan with the buyer ensures both sides have aligned expectations about every step required to finalize the deal.
toeic.example_zh: 與買方共同制定共同成交計畫，可確保雙方對於完成交易所需的每個步驟有一致的期待。

toeic.example_en: Sending detailed recap notes within twenty-four hours of every customer meeting demonstrates professionalism and ensures critical commitments are not overlooked.
toeic.example_zh: 在每次客戶會議後二十四小時內發送詳細的會議摘要記錄，能展現專業度並確保關鍵承諾不被遺漏。

toeic.example_en: Consistent follow-through on small commitments builds trust with prospects and dramatically increases the likelihood of closing larger future deals.
toeic.example_zh: 持續落實對小事的承諾能與潛在客戶建立信任，並大幅提升未來更大型交易的成交機率。

toeic.example_en: Value-based selling quantifies the business outcomes customers can expect rather than focusing primarily on product features and technical capabilities.
toeic.example_zh: 價值導向銷售量化客戶可期待的業務成果，而非主要聚焦於產品功能與技術能力。

toeic.example_en: Solution selling positions the offering as part of a broader strategic answer to the customer's underlying business pain points and goals.
toeic.example_zh: 解決方案式銷售將產品定位為解決客戶根本業務痛點與目標的更廣泛策略性答案的一部分。

toeic.example_en: Effective discovery conversations uncover specific pain points that motivate prospects to invest in changes rather than maintaining their current operational state.
toeic.example_zh: 有效的需求探索對話可發掘特定痛點，促使潛在客戶投資進行改變，而非維持現有的營運狀態。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 規定條款；契約中明確列出的條件
toeic.example_en: The stipulation in the agreement requires the vendor to deliver all components within thirty business days.
toeic.example_zh: 協議中的規定條款要求供應商在三十個工作日內交付所有零件。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 序言；契約開頭說明背景與目的的段落
toeic.example_en: The preamble of the contract clearly outlines the intent and background of both contracting parties.
toeic.example_zh: 契約的序言清楚闡述雙方締約方的意圖與背景。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 鑑於條款；契約前的事實陳述
toeic.example_en: Each recital in the merger document references prior negotiations and the strategic goals of both firms.
toeic.example_zh: 合併文件中的每項鑑於條款都引用了先前談判內容與雙方公司的策略目標。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 正式批准；使協議生效
toeic.example_en: The board will ratify the licensing agreement at next week's quarterly governance meeting.
toeic.example_zh: 董事會將在下週的季度治理會議上正式批准該授權協議。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 廢除；正式取消（法律或協議）
toeic.example_en: The parties agreed to abrogate the outdated supply clause and replace it with revised terms.
toeic.example_zh: 雙方同意廢除過時的供應條款，並以修訂後的條款取代。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 契約更替；以新契約取代舊契約
toeic.example_en: The novation transferred all remaining obligations from the original contractor to the new service provider.
toeic.example_zh: 該契約更替將原承包商的所有剩餘義務轉移給新服務供應商。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 禁反言原則；禁止當事人否認先前陳述
toeic.example_en: The doctrine of estoppel prevented the supplier from denying the verbal commitment made during negotiations.
toeic.example_zh: 禁反言原則阻止該供應商否認談判期間作出的口頭承諾。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 受讓人；契約權利的接收方
toeic.example_en: The assignee will assume all duties and benefits under the existing distribution agreement next month.
toeic.example_zh: 受讓人將於下月承擔現有經銷協議下的所有義務與權益。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 轉讓人；將契約權利讓渡他人者
toeic.example_en: The assignor must notify all clients in writing before transferring the service contract to another firm.
toeic.example_zh: 轉讓人必須在將服務契約轉讓給另一家公司前以書面通知所有客戶。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 討價還價；激烈議價
toeic.example_en: Buyers often haggle over volume discounts before finalizing large procurement orders with overseas suppliers.
toeic.example_zh: 買家在與海外供應商敲定大宗採購訂單前，經常為批量折扣討價還價。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 讓步；承認對方論點
toeic.example_en: Our negotiation team had to concede on payment terms in order to secure the exclusive distribution rights.
toeic.example_zh: 我方談判團隊必須在付款條件上讓步，才能取得獨家經銷權。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 交換讓步；以一項讓步換取對方讓步
toeic.example_en: The buyer offered a tradeoff concession on payment timing in exchange for a longer warranty period.
toeic.example_zh: 買方提出付款時程上的交換讓步，以換取更長的保固期。

toeic.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 陷入僵局的；無法繼續推進的
toeic.example_en: The contract talks became deadlocked over intellectual property ownership and required external mediation help.
toeic.example_zh: 契約談判因智慧財產權歸屬而陷入僵局，需要外部調解協助。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 僵局；雙方無法達成共識的狀態
toeic.example_en: Negotiators reached an impasse on pricing and agreed to resume discussions after internal reviews.
toeic.example_zh: 談判代表在價格上陷入僵局，並同意在內部審查後恢復討論。

toeic.meaning_zh: (動詞) 先發制人；提前採取行動阻止
toeic.example_en: Our legal team drafted protective clauses to preempt potential disputes over delivery schedule changes.
toeic.example_zh: 我們的法務團隊草擬保護條款，以先發制人地預防交貨時程變更引發的爭議。

toeic.meaning_zh: (名詞) 切割條款；契約中排除特定事項的條款
toeic.example_en: The carve-out clause excludes overseas subsidiaries from the new exclusivity provisions of the partnership.
toeic.example_zh: 該切割條款將海外子公司排除在合作協議的新獨家條款之外。
